These findings demonstrate that the effects of robot initiative are simultaneously shaped by users' prior experience, personality traits and more generally by the needs of the group.

</details>


### [403] [Improvement of Robot's Simultaneous Localization and Mapping Using an Effective Transformation to Achieve Linear Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28475)
*Seyed Farzad Bahreinian,Maziar Palhang,Mohammad Reza Taban,Hasan Enami Eraghi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于线性模型卡尔曼滤波（LMKF）的SLAM方法，通过引入简单罗盘和有效变换将非线性模型转化为线性模型，从而解决了EKF-SLAM因非线性导致的发散问题，在精度、收敛性和计算复杂度上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: EKF-based SLAM存在因运动模型和观测模型非线性以及线性化误差导致的发散问题，现有解决方案效果有限，因此需要一种更稳定、精确且计算高效的SLAM方法。

Method: 通过应用一个简单的罗盘并进行有效变换，将非线性状态空间模型转化为线性模型，然后对转换后的线性模型应用标准卡尔曼滤波（KF），形成LMKF SLAM方法。

Result: LMKF SLAM在精度、收敛性和计算复杂度上显著优于EKF-based SLAM等现有方法，对传感器值的不确定性和系统参数变化也更稳定。

Conclusion: LMKF SLAM通过模型线性化有效解决了EKF-SLAM的发散问题，是一种更优的SLAM方案，实验结果验证了其优越性。

Abstract: Nowadays mobile robots have wide engineering applications. Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) is an important task of these robots. The major and common algorithms used for this task are based on extended Kalman filter (EKF). One of the main problems in EKF-based SLAM is its divergence. The nonlinearity of motion and observation models and linearization error are the main reasons for the divergence. There have been some efforts to address this problem with limited success. In this paper, by applying a simple compass and using an effective transformation, we transform the non-linear state space model into a linear model. Then, by applying the original KF to this model, we reach a new method, which is called LMKF SLAM. We show that the LMKF SLAM is significantly superior to the state-of-the-art methods, especially EKF-based SLAMs, both in accuracy, convergence, and computational complexity. The proposed method is also more stable with respect to the uncertainty of sensors values and changes in system parameters. Experimental results verify these points.

</details>


### [404] [FADA: Few-Shot Domain Adaptation via Dynamics Alignment for Humanoid Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28476)
*Angchen Xie,Nikhil Sobanbabu,Ishayu Shikhare,Alan Wang,Max Simchowitz,Guanya Shi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出FADA框架，通过冻结规划器+微调逆动力学模型（仅需2分钟目标域数据），实现人形机器人的少样本域适应，解决动力学不匹配问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人形机器人控制受限于目标域动力学不匹配，现有方法要么零样本迁移效果差，要么需要大量目标域数据重新训练，缺乏高效的少样本适应方案。

Method: 采用三阶段规划器-逆动力学模型（Planner-IDM）框架：①用特权信息训练教师策略；②通过DAgger蒸馏可部署的学生模型；③部署时冻结规划器，仅用约2分钟目标域rollouts的(action, observation)对微调IDM。

Result: 实验显示FADA在动力学偏移下任务性能优于上下文适应和端到端适应基线，并在真实人形机器人上实现了多种高精度全身任务。

Conclusion: FADA通过仅微调轻量IDM实现高效少样本域适应，无需最优示范或奖励信号，为人形机器人高精度控制提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: High-precision humanoid control is limited by target-domain dynamics mismatch, where the same control objective can induce different realized motions under changes in terrain, payload, or actuator response. Existing methods either pursue zero-shot transfer through domain randomization or in-context adaptation without target-domain specialization, or require heavy adaptation pipelines that leverage target-domain data, such as model calibration, residual learning, or policy retraining. In this paper, we present FADA (Few-Shot Domain Adaptation via Dynamics Alignment), a three-stage Planner-Inverse Dynamics Model (Planner-IDM) framework for few-shot adaptation in humanoid control. FADA first trains an oracle policy with privileged information and then distills the oracle behavior into a deployable Planner-IDM student through DAgger. At deployment, FADA freezes the planner and finetunes only the IDM using approximately 2 minutes of target-domain rollouts with standard supervised learning. Rather than requiring optimal demonstrations or rewards, FADA uses the paired actions and observations that are observed during these rollouts as supervision, aligning the IDM's action generation with target-domain dynamics. Experiments show that FADA outperforms both in-context and end-to-end adaptation baselines, improving task performance under dynamics shifts and enabling real humanoid robots to execute diverse high-precision whole-body tasks. Implementation details and qualitative hardware rollout videos are available at https://lecar-lab.github.io/FADA-humanoid/.

</details>


### [405] [The Speedup Paradox: Rethinking Inference Speed-Quality Trade-off in Embodied Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28529)
*Yujin Wang,Junli Chen,Yixuan Li,Shunan Dong,Huazhong Yang,Yongpan Liu,Hongyang Jia*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出TISED框架，用于分解有损推理优化技术在具身任务中的静态与动态效果差异，揭示了一些反直觉现象：静态任务中优化可能延长总完成时间，动态任务中适度优化反而提升成功率，且效果受硬件配置影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有高效推理研究主要关注有损优化（如量化、剪枝）在每步计算开销上的降低，但对具身任务中闭环执行带来的任务级影响缺乏系统表征。

Method: 提出TISED分析框架，统一多种有损推理优化技术，将其效果分解为静态任务和动态任务两个层面进行建模与分析。

Result: 发现了三个反直觉现象：1）静态任务中优化可能延长总完成时间；2）动态任务中适度有损优化可提升任务成功率；3）上述效应的单调性与最优位置随硬件配置变化。

Conclusion: 为具身任务中推理优化技术的适配提供了新视角，揭示了传统静态指标不足以评估具身任务性能。

Abstract: Embodied foundation models have recently been widely used to improve robot generalization and task success rates. Previous works apply lossy efficient-inference techniques such as quantization, pruning, and asynchronous inference, accepting small action quality degradation in exchange for lower per-step computation cost and inter-action latency. However, unlike traditional static ML tasks, embodied tasks involve repeated interaction with the environment, and task-level performance is determined not only by per-step cost, but also by closed-loop effects unique to embodied execution, which remain insufficiently characterized in current efficient-inference studies. In this work, we propose TISED (\underline{T}ask-level \underline{I}nference \underline{S}peedup \underline{E}ffect \underline{D}ecomposition), an analytical framework that unifies diverse lossy inference optimization techniques and decomposes their effects on static and dynamic tasks, and uncovers some paradoxical effects on task-level performance: (1) on \textit{static tasks}, optimization sometimes can lengthen end-to-end per-task completion time even as per-step latency drops; (2) on \textit{dynamic tasks}, moderate lossy optimization can raise task success rate even above the baseline; and (3) the monotonicity and sweet-spot location of both effects can shift with hardware configuration. Together, our findings provide a new perspective on adapting inference optimization techniques to embodied tasks.

</details>


### [406] [Robotic Arm-Based Spectral Sensing for Strawberry Positioning and Non-Destructive Sweetness Measurement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28555)
*Yi Yang,Mark Cardamis,Wen Hu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一套基于机械臂的草莓光谱感知系统，集成YOLOv11s检测、RGB-ToF标定与手眼标定，实现了对草莓的非破坏性甜度评估，在42次试验中取得了88.10%的端到端成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统甜度评估依赖破坏性采样，难以规模化，亟需非破坏性、可扩展的自动化检测方法。

Method: 采用YOLOv11s实时检测草莓，通过RGB-ToF标定与掩码-深度对齐获取几何一致的目标定位，设计定制眼在手上眼标定流程，结合基于航点搜索和增量闭环逼近策略，将传感器置于最佳工作距离进行光谱甜度感知。

Result: 端到端成功率88.10%，检测率95.24%，检测到目标后接近成功率100%。Andreff方法单次平移范数最小，Park方法跨样本一致性更好。

Conclusion: 验证了RGB-ToF感知与机械臂操作集成用于草莓质量评估的可行性，为未来集成视觉-语言-动作模型等学习策略提供了可扩展基线。

Abstract: Accurate assessment of sweetness is essential for quality control in agriculture, yet conventional methods rely on destructive sampling and are difficult to scale. This thesis presents a robotic arm-based spectral sensing system for strawberry detection, localization, approach, and non-destructive sweetness estimation.
  The system integrates perception, calibration, and robotic control in a closed-loop pipeline. A YOLOv11s detector is adopted for real-time strawberry detection, while RGB-ToF calibration and mask-to-depth alignment are used to obtain geometrically consistent target localization. A custom eye-in-hand hand-eye calibration workflow is developed to estimate the rigid transform between gripper_link and cam_front, enabling reliable transformation of fruit targets into the robot base frame. Based on these estimates, the robot executes a waypoint-based search and an incremental closed-loop approach strategy to position the sensor at optimal working distance for sweetness sensing.
  Experimental results show strong end-to-end performance (88.10% success over 42 trials), with robust detection (95.24%) and successful approach execution once a target is detected (100% conditional success). Hand-eye calibration comparisons indicate that although Andreff yields the smallest translation norm in single-run results, the Park method provides better cross-sample consistency and therefore more stable downstream robot behavior. The residual failures are concentrated in the sensing stage, especially valid-region extraction for sweetness estimation under difficult depth/reflectance conditions.
  Overall, this work demonstrates the feasibility of integrating RGB-ToF perception, robotic manipulation, and non-destructive sensing for practical strawberry quality assessment, and provides a scalable baseline for future integration of learning-based policies such as Vision-Language-Action models.

</details>


### [407] [Embodiment Meets Environment: Toward Context-Aware, Safe Physical Caregiving Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28592)
*Zhanxin Wu,Ruofei Tong,Jiaying Fang,Tapomayukh Bhattacharjee*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出E²-CARE框架，通过统一3D动态场景图建模人-机-环境交互上下文，实现护理技能模板的零样本跨环境、跨机器人安全复用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有护理机器人系统与特定环境和机器人形态紧密耦合，缺乏对以人为中心的交互上下文的显式建模，难以在不同场景和机器人间泛化。

Method: 将基础护理技能表示为交互模板，通过统一3D动态场景图（同时建模环境、机器人、人类）显式表达交互上下文，在线生成任务特定约束来重塑技能执行。

Result: 在数百个模拟家庭环境和真实场景中，跨四种日常生活活动和多种机器人形态实现了一致的成功适应，并通过用户研究验证。

Conclusion: E²-CARE使同一技能模板能在不同环境和机器人上零样本安全复用，为护理机器人的上下文感知适应性提供了有效框架。

Abstract: Physical caregiving robots need to assist different users with different tasks in diverse environments, and they come in many embodiments. While substantial progress has been made on individual caregiving tasks, most existing systems remain tightly coupled to specific environments and robot embodiments, and often do not explicitly model or constrain interactions around people, despite humans being special agents in the environment. This motivates a focus on adapting to context that emerges from the joint interaction between the environment and the robot's embodiment. We propose $E^2$-CARE, a framework that enables context-aware adaptation by representing primitive caregiving skills as interaction templates whose execution is reshaped online. $E^2$-CARE represents the environment, the robot, and the human within a unified 3D dynamic scene graph that models these interaction contexts explicitly, and synthesizes task-specific constraints to govern how each skill is executed. By enforcing these constraints at runtime, the same skill templates can be reused zero-shot and safely across diverse environments and robot embodiments. We evaluate $E^2$-CARE across four activities of daily living in hundreds of simulated household environments, including assistive home settings, and across diverse robot embodiments, and validate it through user studies on two caregiving tasks with two robots in various real-world environments. Results demonstrate consistent and successful adaptation across these environments and embodiments. Website: https://emprise.cs.cornell.edu/e2care

</details>


### [408] [Fast and Accurate Outlier-Aware LiDAR Super-Resolution for SLAM Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28607)
*Christos Anagnostopoulos,Alexandros Gkillas,Nikos Piperigkos,Aris S. Lalos*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于深度展开的超分辨率模型，用于提升低分辨率LiDAR传感器在SLAM应用中的性能，通过集成离群点移除模块，在保持实时性的同时显著提升了位姿估计精度和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有低分辨率LiDAR传感器在SLAM应用中精度受限，而现有超分辨率方法计算开销大、实时性差，难以满足SLAM对效率和精度双重要求。

Method: 提出Deep Unrolling-based Super-Resolution (SR)模型，集成离群点移除模块，采用基于模型优化的方法，在少量计算开销下高效重建高分辨率点云。

Result: 在LiDAR SLAM框架中评估，相比现有超分辨率方法，显著提升了位姿估计的精度和效率。

Conclusion: 所提出的深度展开超分辨率模型有效解决了低分辨率LiDAR在SLAM中的局限性，实现了精度与效率的良好平衡。

Abstract: This work tackles the challenge of enhancing low-resolution LiDAR sensors for SLAM applications through a novel Deep Unrolling-based Super-Resolution (SR) model. We integrate an outlier removal module to ensure structural integrity while maintaining real-time performance. By leveraging a model-based optimization approach, our method efficiently reconstructs high-resolution point clouds while minimizing computational overhead. The proposed SR model is evaluated within a LiDAR SLAM framework, demonstrating significant improvements in pose estimation accuracy and efficiency compared to state-of-the-art SR methods.

</details>


### [409] [PinNet: Keypoint-Aware Learned Local Descriptors with Geometric Embedding for Loop Closure in LiDAR SLAM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28637)
*Yanlong Ma,Nakul S. Joshi,Christa S. Robison,Philip R. Osteen,Brett T. Lopez*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: PinNet是一种利用平面几何自注意力机制从点云生成局部几何描述符的神经网络，用于环形闭合检测和点云配准，在多个数据集上表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在大规模环境中，仅依靠几何信息（如LiDAR）进行可靠的环形闭合仍具挑战性，因为难以构造具有判别性的几何特征。

Method: 提出PinNet网络，包含关键点及其描述符生成模块，以及基于平面的几何自注意力模块，用于建模关键点间空间关系以增强描述符判别性。

Result: 在多个不同LiDAR传感器采集的数据集上，PinNet在场所识别、相对位姿估计和单次定位中均展现出优异性能。

Conclusion: PinNet能够有效提升基于几何信息的环形闭合检测和点云配准精度，实现全局一致性地图构建。

Abstract: Loop closure is essential to reduce drift and build globally consistent maps in large-scale environments. However, reliable loop closure with only geometric information from, e.g., a LiDAR sensor, remains challenging due to the difficulty of constructing discriminative geometric features. We present PinNet, a neural network that produces local geometric descriptors from point clouds for place recognition and scanto-scan registration. PinNet incorporates a neural network that generates keypoints and their corresponding descriptors, together with a plane-based geometric self-attention module that models inter-keypoint spatial relationships to enhance descriptor discriminability for loop-closure detection and point-cloud registration. The approach is comprehensively evaluated on multiple datasets collected with different LiDAR sensors. Experimental results demonstrate strong place-recognition performance, precise relative pose estimation, and successful single-shot localization in different environments.

</details>


### [410] [J-LAW: Joint Localization and Actionable World Modeling via Coupled Latent Factor Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28712)
*Guanqun Cao,Liang Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出J-LAW，通过耦合因子图联合优化度量位姿与潜在世界模型，实现同时具备全局度量一致性和可行动预测能力的建图。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典SLAM能估计度量位姿和几何地图，但缺乏可行动预测模型用于规划；而动作条件世界模型学习紧凑潜在动力学用于规划，却忽略全局度量一致性且在开环推演下累积漂移。作者认为这两个问题本质上是同一估计问题的两个方面。

Method: 提出J-LAW，构建耦合因子图，联合优化度量物体位姿、潜在世界状态和潜在地标嵌入。核心桥梁是位姿条件的潜在编码器和学习的位姿-潜在耦合因子，实现定位与世界模型的相互促进。将观测、动作条件预测、度量里程计、位姿-潜在耦合、潜在闭环检测和潜在地标观测统一为单个MAP目标中的概率因子。

Result: 在PushT和WildGS数据集上的实验表明：耦合图修正显著降低了潜在预测RMSE和端点漂移（相比开环推演），潜在闭环检测改善了全局轨迹一致性。

Conclusion: J-LAW生成的地图同时具备度量属性（位姿）和可行动属性（用于规划的潜在地标），实现了度量一致性与规划能力的高效统一。

Abstract: Classical SLAM estimates metric poses and a geometric map but produces no actionable predictive model for planning. Action-conditioned world models learn compact latent dynamics for planning but ignore global metric consistency and accumulate drift under open-loop rollout. We argue these are two views of the same estimation problem and propose J-LAW (Joint Localization and Actionable World Modeling) in this letter: a coupled factor graph that jointly optimizes metric object poses, latent world states, and latent landmark embeddings. The bridge is a pose-conditioned latent encoder and a learned pose--latent coupling factor, so that better localization improves the world model and vice versa. We cast observation, action-conditioned prediction, metric odometry, pose--latent coupling, latent loop closure, and latent landmark observation as probabilistic factors in a single MAP objective. Real-data experiments on PushT and WildGS show that coupled graph correction substantially reduces latent prediction RMSE and endpoint drift relative to open-loop rollout, while latent loop closure improves global trajectory consistency. J-LAW yields a map that is simultaneously metric (poses) and actionable (latent landmarks for planning).

</details>


### [411] [CubifyGS: Object-Centric 3D Gaussian Splatting for Lifelong Dynamic Scene Maintenance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28720)
*Bohan Ren,Dianyi Yang,Shiyang Liu,Yu Gao,Jiadong Tang,Zhilin Lai,Yi Yang,Mengyin Fu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: CubifyGS是一种面向物体级场景映射的框架，将动态维护从被动重优化转变为主动资产管理，通过将可移动实例建模为可复用的高斯资产，并结合事件触发的自适应优化策略，有效抑制重影并提升维护效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人长期场景映射在物体被刚性重排后，传统3DGS的图元级更新会导致持续重影和缓慢恢复，亟需更高效的动态维护方法。

Method: 提出CubifyGS框架：将可移动物体建模为可复用的高斯资产；通过资产检索、刚性变换和显式剪枝更新地图；采用事件触发的自适应优化策略，仅对受影响区域进行针对性计算。

Result: 在构建的高保真动态基准上，CubifyGS相比现有代表性基线方法，在伪影抑制和维护效率方面均表现更优。

Conclusion: 主动资产管理策略比被动重优化更适合处理物体重排场景下的动态场景映射，CubifyGS有效解决了几何空洞和局部光度不匹配问题。

Abstract: Lifelong scene mapping under rigid object rearrangement remains a fundamental challenge in robotics. While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables high-fidelity modeling, primitive-level updates often cause persistent ghosting and slow recovery. We propose CubifyGS, an object-level mapping framework that shifts dynamic maintenance from passive re-optimization to active asset management. CubifyGS models movable instances as reusable Gaussian assets, detects object appearance and disappearance, and updates maps through asset retrieval, rigid transformation, and explicit pruning rather than reconstruction from scratch. To address geometric voids and local photometric mismatch after such edits, we further propose an event-triggered adaptive optimization strategy that focuses computation on affected regions. We validate our approach on a newly constructed high-fidelity dynamic benchmark, demonstrating that CubifyGS improves artifact suppression and maintenance efficiency over representative reproducible baselines in the evaluated object-rearrangement setting.

</details>


### [412] [He3-Seeker: Robotic Information Planning for Lunar Helium-3 Distribution Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28746)
*Dong Li,Yujie Zheng,Chengdeng Cao,Siyu Teng,Yuchen Li,Yang Gao,Long Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了He3-Seeker，一种基于主动机器人勘探的月球氦-3分布测绘方法，通过多点钻探、采样和原位分析，结合机器人信息规划（RIP）实现自主导航与主动感知，仿真实验验证了该方法能快速高保真地绘制氦-3分布图。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 月球氦-3是深空探测和太空采矿的关键战略资源，但现有遥感探测方法精度低、可靠性差、空间分辨率不足，亟需更高效的主动勘探方法。

Method: 首先正式定义主动氦-3勘探问题，然后提出He3-Seeker框架，基于多点钻探、采样和原位分析，利用机器人信息规划（RIP）引导自主导航和主动感知，并引入基于低分辨率轨道遥感数据的参考数据生成方法进行算法评估。

Result: 仿真实验表明He3-Seeker能够实现快速且高保真的氦-3分布测绘，为资源勘探任务提供了可靠的解决方案。

Conclusion: He3-Seeker有效解决了月球氦-3主动勘探问题，代码和仿真环境已开源，为未来月球资源勘探提供了可行的技术路径。

Abstract: Lunar helium-3 is a highly valuable strategic resource, pivotal to the advancement of both deep-space exploration and space mining. Existing lunar helium-3 exploration methodologies rely primarily on indirect measurements via remote sensing, which are often characterized by limited precision, low reliability, and insufficient spatial resolution. In this paper, we introduce He3-Seeker, an active robotic exploration method for helium-3 distribution mapping. First, we provide a formal definition of the active helium-3 exploration problem. Subsequently, we developed the He3-Seeker framework, which is conceptually based on multi-point drilling, sampling, and in situ analysis. In particular, we use robotic information planning (RIP) to guide autonomous robot navigation and active sensing. Additionally, to thoroughly evaluate the proposed algorithm, we introduce a reliable method for generating reference data of lunar helium-3 distribution based on low-resolution orbital remote sensing measurements. Simulation experiments verify that He3-Seeker achieves both rapid and high-fidelity mapping of helium-3 distribution, providing a reliable solution for resource exploration tasks. Our code and simulation environment will be publicly accessible at https://github.com/OpenSpace-Lab/He3-Seeker.

</details>


### [413] [Vision-Language Models for Deployable Social Robot Navigation: Bridging Semantic Reasoning and Low-Level Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28760)
*Runji Cai,Toshihiko Yamasaki,Ling Xiao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 综述了如何将视觉-语言模型（VLM）集成到社交机器人导航（SRN）系统中，提出了一个包含高层VLM推理、低层规划控制以及中间衔接机制的三组件框架，并给出了耦合VLM与导航系统的结构化路线图。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统导航方法缺乏语义推理能力，难以在复杂人类中心环境中实现社交合规行为；VLM虽提供了高层次理解和常识推理能力，但如何将其可靠地集成到实时、安全关键的导航系统中仍是一个根本性挑战。

Method: 采用综述方法，从统一视角将现有VLM-SRN方法组织为三个互联组件（高层VLM推理、低层规划控制、中间衔接机制），并提出结构化路线图涵盖语义推理、评估器、空间定位、中间表征和控制模块。

Result: 提出了VLM与导航系统耦合的结构化路线图，总结了代表性数据集和评估平台，指出了VLM的优势与混合架构的必要性。

Conclusion: 本综述为构建可靠、社交合规且可部署的VLM导航系统提供了基础框架，并指出了未来关键的开放挑战。

Abstract: Social robot navigation (SRN) requires more than geometric path planning; it demands understanding human intentions, social norms, and contextual cues to generate socially compliant behaviors. Although classical navigation methods provide reliable metric planning and collision avoidance, they often lack the semantic reasoning capabilities necessary for operation in complex human-centered environments. Recent advances in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have opened new opportunities for SRN by enabling high-level VLM understanding, commonsense reasoning, and natural language interaction. However, a fundamental challenge remains: how to integrate VLMs into real-time, safety-critical navigation systems and reliably translate their high-level reasoning into grounded navigation actions. In this survey, we present a unified perspective of VLM-based SRN and organize existing approaches into three interconnected components: high-level VLM reasoning, low-level planning and control, and intermediate mechanisms that bridge reasoning and action. Based on this perspective, we propose a structured roadmap for coupling VLMs with navigation systems, covering semantic reasoning, evaluators, spatial grounding, intermediate representations, and control modules. The roadmap highlights both the strengths of VLMs and the necessity of hybrid architectures for practical deployment. We further review representative datasets and evaluation platforms developed for SRN. Finally, we discuss key open challenges. This survey aims to provide a foundation for building reliable, socially compliant, and deployable VLM-enabled navigation systems.

</details>


### [414] [Physics Models for Sim-to-Real Transfer in Professional-Level Robot Table Tennis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28805)
*Christian Conti,Bilan Yang,Alexander Sigrist,Lorenzo Miele,Yamen Saraiji,Peter Dürr,Naoya Takahashi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文通过精确建模空气动力学、球台碰撞和球拍接触的物理模型，结合残差神经网络，训练强化学习策略，首次实现了能与职业选手对战的真实机器人乒乓球AI代理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人乒乓球仿真无法捕捉职业级比赛中球的速度和旋转范围，导致策略在真实世界中存在被对手利用的弱点，且真实环境训练成本高、有危险。

Method: 1) 空气动力学：将阻力和马格努斯力系数建模为雷诺数和自旋比的函数；2) 球台接触：考虑球体屈曲对恢复系数的影响，引入残差到瞬时点接触模型；3) 球拍接触：引入残差神经网络补充法向/切向恢复系数及扭转自旋阻尼系数。

Result: 所建模型首次让真实机器人乒乓球AI代理能够与职业选手进行对抗比赛。

Conclusion: 高保真物理建模对策略从仿真迁移到真实世界至关重要，残差神经网络能有效弥补传统解析模型的不足，实现更广泛的球速和旋转覆盖。

Abstract: At competitive speeds and spins, a table tennis ball follows complex, counterintuitive trajectories that a robot must track and precisely counter within fractions of a second. Training a reinforcement learning policy capable of these skills is prohibitively expensive and dangerous in the real world, making high-fidelity simulation essential. Transferability of such policies, however, critically depends on how faithfully the simulation captures real-world dynamics--a requirement made even more stringent by the adversarial nature of the game, where any regime in which a model fails to approximate reality becomes an exploitable weakness for the opponent. Prior state-of-the-art in robot table tennis generally focuses on a limited range of velocities and spins and fails to capture the richness of ball behaviors encountered in professional-level play. In this work, we present physics models for the aerodynamic ball flight, for the contact dynamics between the ball and the table, as well as between the ball and the racket that accurately capture the ball behavior over a vast range of speeds and spins relevant to the game. Specifically, we model drag and Magnus force coefficients as functions of Reynolds number and spin ratio in the aerodynamics equations. For the table contact model we model effects of ball buckling on the coefficient of restitution and incorporate residuals into the instantaneous point-contact models. For the racket contact model we introduce a residual neural network component to complement coefficients related to normal and tangential coefficients of restitution as well as torsional spin damping. The resulting models were used for the first real-world robot table tennis AI agent capable of competing against professional players, to train reinforcement learning policies.

</details>


### [415] [Human2Any: Human-to-Robot Transfer via Constraint-Aware Compositional Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28813)
*Shuo Cheng,Chuye Zhang,Alfred Cueva,Caelan Garrett,Ajay Mandlekar,Danfei Xu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Human2Any是一个从人类视频中学习可复用的物体-物体交互先验知识，并将其迁移到不同机器人平台（无需真实机器人数据）的框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类视频数量庞大且富含物体交互信息，但将人类示教迁移到机器人面临形态不匹配、场景变化和机器人可行性约束等挑战，现有方法需要真实机器人数据，成本高且泛化性差。

Method: 通过物体-物体交互运动表示操作，提取任务相关的场景变化而忽略具体形态细节；将学习到的交互先验与机器人侧可行性推理和运动规划相结合。

Result: 在Franka桌面平台和RBY-1人形移动机器人上进行了真实世界实验，展示了无需真实机器人训练数据的鲁棒交互中心操作。

Conclusion: Human2Any能够有效地从人类视频中学习可迁移的操作先验，适应不同机器人形态、场景几何和任务环境，是实现跨形态示教迁移的有效途径。

Abstract: Human videos are a scalable source of supervision for robot manipulation, as they are abundant and naturally capture rich object interactions. However, transferring human demonstrations to robots remains challenging due to embodiment mismatch, scene variation, and robot-specific feasibility constraints. We present Human2Any, a framework for learning reusable object-centric interaction priors from human videos without requiring real-world robot demonstrations in the target task contexts. Human2Any represents manipulation through object-object interaction motion, capturing task-relevant scene changes while abstracting away embodiment-specific details. It composes learned interaction priors with robot-side feasibility reasoning and motion planning, allowing the same human-derived knowledge to adapt to different embodiments, scene geometries, and task contexts. We validate Human2Any across diverse manipulation settings, including real-world experiments on a Franka tabletop setup and an RBY-1 humanoid mobile robot, demonstrating robust interaction-centric manipulation without real-world robot training data. Project website: https://human2any.github.io/.

</details>


### [416] [LNN-Fly: Continuous-Time UAV Navigation for Robust Obstacle Avoidance under Timing Mismatch](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28827)
*Yulin Huang,Shaojie Chen,Di Feng,Jiahao Wang,Ping Liu,Jianxiao Zou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出LNN-Fly，一种面向部署的连续时间导航策略，通过结合结构化循环更新、显式控制间隔条件化和自适应遗忘门，提升了无人机在仿真和真实环境中的避障性能，并在室内跨频率实飞测试中实现100%成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 端到端无人机导航在仿真中表现优异，但部署后因仿真器不匹配、感知不规则和可变速率控制导致避障性能下降，尤其在杂乱环境中易发生碰撞。

Method: 提出LNN-Fly策略，包含动态规划启发的结构化循环更新、显式条件化控制间隔Δt、输入驱动的自适应遗忘门，并采用包含部署相关感知与时序扰动的可微展开训练。

Result: 仿真中在多种测试场景下提升避障性能，对低控制频率、稀疏观测和控制周期抖动具有更好容错性；零样本从简化可微仿真器迁移到物理四旋翼；室内跨频率实飞20次100%成功，桌面GPU推理中位延迟0.514ms，机载CPU约2.5ms，P95延迟低于30ms。

Conclusion: LNN-Fly通过部署导向的设计有效弥合了仿真到现实的差距，实现了高效、稳定的无人机避障导航。

Abstract: End-to-end unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) navigation can achieve impressive agility in simulation, yet its obstacle-avoidance behavior often degrades after deployment because the policy must tolerate simulator mismatch, sensing irregularity, and variable-rate control. These effects are especially dangerous in cluttered environments, where stale observations or short control irregularities can directly lead to collisions. We present LNN-Fly, a deployment-oriented continuous-time navigation policy for LiDAR-based UAV obstacle avoidance. The policy combines a dynamic-programming-inspired structured recurrent update, explicit conditioning on the elapsed control interval Δt, and an input-driven adaptive forgetting gate that refreshes stale latent state near hazards while preserving consistency during sustained maneuvers. It is trained with differentiable rollouts that incorporate deployment-relevant sensing and timing perturbations. In simulation, LNN-Fly improves obstacle-avoidance performance in the tested settings and shows better tolerance to reduced control frequency, sparse observations, and control-period jitter. It also transfers zero-shot from a simplified differentiable simulator to a physical quadrotor. In indoor cross-frequency real-world tests, the system achieves 100% success over 20 flights, while policy inference has a median latency of 0.514 ms on a desktop graphics processing unit (GPU) and about 2.5 ms on the onboard central processing unit (CPU), with onboard P95 latency below 30 ms.

</details>


### [417] [You Only Touch Once: 6-DoF Object Pose Estimation from Single Tactile Contact](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28899)
*Pengfei Ye,Yuxiang Ma,Haonan Chen,Guangming Wang,Yixiong Jing,Brian Sheil,Yilun Du,Edward Adelson*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: YOTO是一种仅依赖触觉的6-DoF物体姿态估计系统，通过单次双点接触和粗到细网络实现精确姿态恢复，在视觉不可靠场景下优于视觉和几何基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉方法在遮挡、光照差、反光或透明表面等场景下容易失效，而现有触觉方法往往需要接触历史或多步迭代。本文旨在提出一种仅需单次双接触即可恢复完整6-DoF姿态的触觉方案。

Method: 将每个触觉接触表示为局部3D点云，通过粗到细网络定位到物体表面；利用两个定位后的接触点及标定后的传感器位姿，通过封闭形式的法线感知SVD求解器一步恢复完整6-DoF姿态；定位网络先在虚拟触觉补丁上预训练，再用少量真实接触微调。

Result: 在四个几何多样物体上，YOTO实现了精确的触觉接触定位和姿态估计，在视觉不可靠场景下显著优于视觉和几何基线方法。此外，YOTO可适配消费级手机扫描重建的物体模型，性能略逊于CAD模型但仍有竞争力。

Conclusion: YOTO证明了纯触觉方案在挑战性视觉条件下进行精确6-DoF姿态估计的可行性与有效性，为机器人在复杂环境中的操作提供了可靠替代方案。

Abstract: Accurate 6-DoF object pose estimation is fundamental to robotic manipulation, yet vision-based methods often fail under occlusion, poor lighting, and reflective or transparent surfaces. We present YOTO, a tactile-only pose estimation system that recovers the full 6-DoF object pose from a single pair of simultaneous contacts, without requiring contact history. YOTO represents each tactile contact as a local 3D point cloud and localizes it on the object surface through a coarse-to-fine network. The two localized contacts, together with the calibrated sensor poses, are then fed to a closed-form normal-aware SVD solver that recovers the full 6-DoF object pose in one step. To reduce real-data requirements, the localization network is pretrained on virtual tactile patches sampled from the object model and fine-tuned with a small number of real contacts. We further show that YOTO can operate on object models reconstructed from consumer-grade mobile scans, and quantify the gap relative to CAD-based models. Experiments on four geometrically diverse objects demonstrate accurate tactile contact localization and pose estimation, outperforming vision-based and geometric baselines, especially when visual perception is unreliable. Code, trained models, and the real GelSight dataset will be released upon publication.

</details>


### [418] [Cross-Session 3D LiDAR and Camera Fusion for Robust Localization of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles in GPS-Denied Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28951)
*Cong Hoang Quach,Chi Thanh Vo,Dong LT. Tran,Truong Son Nguyen,Manh Duong Phung,Thuan Hoang Tran*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出Cross-Fusion方法，融合3D LiDAR和单目相机实现GPS拒止环境下无人机实时定位，通过跨会话融合策略提升地图完整性和定位一致性，在特征稀疏环境中仍能保持高精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决GPS信号拒止或不稳定环境（如室内、隧道、城市峡谷、大型结构下方）中无人机精确定位的难题。

Method: Cross-Fusion方法：融合3D LiDAR和单目相机数据；采用跨会话融合策略整合多个智能体在基线巡检中采集的视觉和几何信息；利用LiDAR里程计进行运动跟踪，通过单目RGB相机图像特征匹配修正漂移。

Result: 定位精度与基于GPS的方法相当，在特征稀疏环境中仍能可靠运行。

Conclusion: Cross-Fusion以简单传感器配置实现了与GPS方法相当的定位精度，并在特征稀疏环境下表现可靠，为GPS拒止环境中的无人机定位提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Accurate localization of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) is essential for applications such as structural health monitoring, especially in environments where Global Positioning System (GPS) signals are denied or unreliable, like indoor spaces, tunnels, urban canyons, or areas beneath large structures. To address this challenge, we propose Cross-Fusion, a novel method for real-time UAV localization that integrates data from a 3D Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR) and a monocular camera. A key contribution is its cross-session fusion strategy, which integrates visual and geometric information collected from multiple agents during routine baseline surveys to improve localization consistency and map completeness. The system employs LiDAR-based odometry for motion tracking and image-based feature matching via a single red-green-blue (RGB) camera to correct drift and improve accuracy. Unlike visual-inertial systems, Cross-Fusion maintains a simple sensor setup and avoids the complexity of stereo or global shutter configurations. Experimental results demonstrate that Cross-Fusion achieves localization accuracy comparable to GPS-based methods and performs reliably in challenging feature-sparse environments.

</details>


### [419] [HJ-SafeDMP: Hamilton-Jacobi Reachability-Guided Dynamic Movement Primitives for Provably Safe Robot Motion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.28995)
*Siddhanth Ramesh,Ravi Prakash*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出HJ-SafeDMP框架，将动态运动基元（DMPs）与基于HJ可达性分析的安全价值函数结合，实现机器人运动的形式化安全保障与高效实时计算。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DMPs虽具有稳定性与轨迹泛化能力，但缺乏形式化安全证书；而HJ可达性分析虽能提供最坏情况安全保证，但传统方法受维数灾难影响无法实时控制。因此需要一种兼具安全性与计算效率的方法。

Method: 1）从离线演示数据中通过无模型的有限差分HJ递归学习控制障碍价值函数（CBVF）；2）采用闭式控制律作为实时安全滤波器，避免在线求解二次规划；3）使用expectile-based离线学习目标避免查询分布外动作；4）引入保形预测校准提供有限样本概率安全覆盖。

Result: 在7自由度机器人操作臂上，HJ-SafeDMP实现了形式化安全保证，执行速度比基于优化的基线方法快数个数量级，同时保持了DMP的鲁棒性与适应性。

Conclusion: 该方法成功将形式化安全验证与高效轨迹生成统一，为人机交互等安全关键应用提供了实用方案。

Abstract: Robots deployed in safety-critical environments must execute motions that are simultaneously robust to disturbances and provably safe from collisions. Dynamic Movement Primitives (DMPs) offer inherent stability, temporal flexibility, and efficient trajectory generalization from single demonstrations, but they lack formal safety certificates. Conversely, Hamilton-Jacobi (HJ) Reachability analysis provides a principled framework for computing worst-case safety margins and forward-invariant safe sets, but classical grid-based methods suffer from the curse of dimensionality and are impractical for real-time control. This paper introduces HJ-SafeDMP, a framework that integrates DMPs with learned HJ Reachability-based safety value functions to achieve provably safe, robust, and computationally efficient robot motion. We learn a Control Barrier Value Function (CBVF) from offline demonstration data using a model-free, finite-difference HJ recursion and deploy it as a real-time safety filter via a closed-form control law that modulates the DMP output. Unlike optimization-based CBF-QP approaches, our method achieves safety filtering without online quadratic program solves, preserving the computational efficiency of DMPs. We further incorporate an expectile-based offline learning objective that avoids querying out-of-distribution actions, and a conformal prediction calibration step that provides finite-sample probabilistic safety coverage. Experimental evaluation on a 7-DOF robot manipulator demonstrates that HJ-SafeDMP achieves formal safety guarantees with orders-of-magnitude faster execution than optimization-based baselines, while maintaining the robustness and adaptability of DMPs for human-robot interaction.

</details>


### [420] [Keypose Exploration: Efficient Automatic Trajectory Labelling and Cross-Embodiment Policy Transfer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29028)
*Yupu Lu,Hang Xu,Yizhou Chen,Jia Pan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种自动轨迹标注流水线，结合视觉语言模型与经典轨迹分析提取关键姿态，并利用关键姿态引导的扩散策略实现跨本体迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于关键姿态的操作方法依赖任务特定的启发式规则或人工标注来提取关键姿态，缺乏自动化和通用性。

Method: 1) 提出自动标注流水线：结合VLM语义事件检测与经典轨迹分析进行时间对齐，每个任务只需对一条演示进行VLM推理。2) 训练关键姿态引导的扩散策略（Keypose-guided Diffusion Policy），利用关键姿态条件干预演示分布。3) 通过可达性地图采样和过滤候选关键姿态，实现跨本体零样本迁移。

Result: 在robomimic的两个任务上，标注数据训练的策略与标准DP基线性能相当；在具有可行候选关键姿态的多模态插入任务上，可达性过滤的关键姿态条件可能有利于零样本迁移。

Conclusion: 该自动标注方法和关键姿态引导策略在跨本体迁移方面展现出初步可行性。

Abstract: Keypose-based manipulation decomposes tasks into critical waypoints to simplify policy learning for long-horizon tasks, but existing approaches rely on task-specific heuristics or manual annotation to extract keyposes from demonstrations. We present an automatic trajectory labelling pipeline for grasp-related tasks. This pipeline combines vision-language models (VLMs) for semantic event detection with classical trajectory analysis for precise temporal alignment, requiring VLM inference only on one single demo among repeating ones per task. Using the labelled data, we train a keypose-guided Diffusion Policy (DP) that exploits keypose conditioning to intervene demonstration distributions. We explore the possibility to apply this property for cross-embodiment transfer: candidate keyposes are sampled and filtered via a reachability map, steering the policy toward kinematically feasible keyposes for the target robot. As a preliminary feasibility study, experiments on two robomimic tasks show that the labelled data produces policies matching a standard DP baseline, and that reachability-filtered keypose conditioning may benefit zero-shot transfer on the multimodal insertion task when feasible candidates are available.

</details>


### [421] [A Unified Framework for Multi-Contact Path Planning in the Rolling Robot Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29065)
*Qing Yu,Mikhail Svinin,Seyed Amir Tafrishi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于Montana接触坐标的多球滚动无滑移路径规划框架，通过在球面接触流形上构建Voronoi图并进行流形保形平滑，实现了多接触滚动运动规划。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 滚动运动规划因非完整约束和弯曲流形而具有挑战性，多接触场景下多个球体无滑移滚动且接触状态耦合，问题更加复杂，现有方法难以有效处理。

Method: 利用Montana接触坐标公式推导多球滚动运动学模型，在球面接触流形上构建Voronoi图，引入球冠障碍物和互斥区域进行流形碰撞检测，并通过流形保形的log-exp平滑算法优化路径。

Result: 通过前向仿真验证了生成的平滑曲面路径可提升为可行的多接触滚动运动，并评估了路径质量与轨迹平滑度、Voronoi种子密度和计算时间的关系。

Conclusion: 该框架为扩展到非球面几何、时变障碍环境及物理机器人平台实验验证奠定了基础。

Abstract: Rolling motion planning is challenging because rolling contact imposes nonholonomic constraints and the configuration evolves on a curved manifold. The problem becomes substantially harder in multi-contact settings, where multiple bodies roll without slip and the contact states are coupled. This paper presents a new framework for multi-contact path planning in spherical rolling robotics under no-slip constraints. We first derive a compact kinematic model for multi-sphere rolling using Montana's contact-coordinate formulation, where each contact is represented by a stacked five-state vector. Building on this model, we construct a Voronoi-based roadmap directly on the spherical contact manifold, incorporating spherical-cap obstacles and mutual-exclusion regions via on-manifold collision checking, and refine discrete graph paths using manifold-consistent log-exp smoothing. The resulting smoothed surface paths are then lifted to admissible multi-contact rolling motions through the derived Montana kinematics and validated via forward simulation. We further evaluate feasibility and path quality versus trajectory smoothness, Voronoi seed density, and computation time. The proposed framework provides a foundation for extending the method to non-spherical geometries, time-varying obstacle environments, and experimental validation on physical rolling robotic platforms.

</details>


### [422] [TAP-VLA: Tactile Annotation Prompting for Vision Language Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29089)
*Mark Van der Merwe,Mohamad Louai Shehab,Jayjun Lee,Youngsun Wi,Yinpei Dai,Dmitry Berenson,Nima Fazeli*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: TAP-VLA通过在视觉观测上叠加触觉剪切场图像，在不改变模型架构的前提下将触觉信息融入VLA模型，在接触丰富的操作任务中成功率78%，远超视觉基线（<50%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLA模型在视觉、语义和空间推理上表现优异，但对接触力几乎"失明"——触觉信息在视觉反馈中不明显，而直接添加触觉模态会因分布偏移破坏VLA的预训练优势。

Method: 从视觉触觉传感器提取剪切场，以空间标注的向量形式叠加到多视角RGB图像上，使触觉信息在VLA原生观测空间中呈现为清晰可解释的视觉线索，不改动模型架构。

Result: 在四项接触丰富操作任务中，TAP-VLA成功率78%，视觉微调基线低于50%，其他触觉融合基线在部分任务中表现接近随机水平。

Conclusion: 通过视觉增强而非架构修改引入触觉反馈，是一种轻量、高效且不偏离预训练分布的触觉融合方案，显著提升VLA在接触丰富任务中的表现。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models demonstrate impressive reasoning over visual, semantic, and spatial task variations by leveraging large-scale vision and language pre-training. They remain, however, largely blind to contact forces, which seldom manifest clearly in visual feedback but are central to contact-rich manipulation. Tactile sensing measures these forces directly, but integrating it into VLAs is difficult: tactile data is absent from the large-scale corpora used to pre-train VLAs, so adding it as a new input modality induces a distribution shift that erodes the very pre-training that makes VLAs effective. We propose Tactile Annotation Prompting for Vision-Language-Action models (TAP-VLA), a simple framework that supplies tactile feedback through visual augmentation rather than architectural change. TAP-VLA extracts shear fields from visuo-tactile sensors and overlays them as spatially-grounded vectors onto the multi-view RGB images the policy already consumes, yielding a clear, interpretable tactile cue in the VLA's native observation space. Because the architecture is untouched, the approach requires no tactile pre-training, adds negligible compute, and stays close to the pre-training distribution. Across four contact-rich tasks, TAP-VLA succeeds on 78% of trials, compared to under 50% for vision-only fine-tuning and alternative tactile-fusion baselines -- including tasks where the baselines perform no better than chance.

</details>


### [423] [When Stopping Fails: Rethinking Minimal Risk Conditions through Human-Interactive Autonomous Driving for Safe Transportation Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29115)
*Yash Tandon,Giovanni Tapia Lopez,Marcus Blennemann,Mohan Trivedi,Ross Greer*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文指出自动驾驶汽车现有的以碰撞避免和最小风险策略为主的安全框架存在不足，通过分析公开事件归纳了感知、规划、控制三方面的限制，提出必须从被动降级策略转向人机交互式自主驾驶。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动驾驶安全框架主要关注碰撞避免和停车降级，但实际部署中发现停车行为本身会导致交通阻塞、干扰应急响应、造成无障碍问题，亟需更全面的安全范式。

Method: 分析公开报道的自动驾驶汽车停车行为及人机交互失败事件，按感知、规划、控制的局限性进行分类，形成分类体系，并据此梳理现有安全范式的关键缺口，再回顾新兴研究方向。

Result: 识别出三大关键缺口：缺乏理解人类权威的机制、缺乏响应多模态指令的能力、缺乏适应动态社会性交通规则的能力；对应提出了人机交互感知、语言引导与无障碍规划、远程引导与遥操作等研究方向。

Conclusion: 自动驾驶汽车在城市环境中可靠部署需要超越被动的降级策略，转向具备人机交互能力的自主驾驶框架。

Abstract: Autonomous vehicles (AVs) are increasingly deployed in urban environments, yet their safety frameworks remain primarily designed around collision avoidance and minimal risk condition (MRC) behaviors such as slowing or stopping when uncertainty arises. Although effective in reducing immediate crash risk, real-world deployments indicate that stopping alone does not guarantee safe integration into human-governed roadway systems. Incidents reported by municipalities and public records show that AV fallback behaviors can obstruct traffic, interfere with emergency response operations, and create accessibility challenges for passengers and pedestrians. This paper presents an analysis of publicly documented incidents involving AV stopping behavior and human-AV interaction failures. We categorize these incidents according to limitations in perception, planning, and control within current AV architectures. Using this taxonomy, we identify key gaps in existing safety paradigms, particularly the lack of mechanisms for interpreting human authority, responding to multimodal instructions, and adapting to dynamic, socially regulated traffic conditions. We then review emerging research directions that support human-interactive perception, language-grounded and accessibility-aware planning, and assisted control through remote guidance and teleoperation. The analysis highlights the need to augment current AV safety frameworks with capabilities that enable cooperative interaction with human agents and infrastructure. These findings suggest that reliable urban deployment of AVs requires moving beyond passive fallback strategies toward human-interactive autonomy.

</details>


### [424] [On the Identifiability of Aided Inertial Navigation Under Measurement Delays: A Geometric Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29123)
*Jonathan Kelly*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文研究了辅助惯性导航系统中传感器相对时间延迟的辨识问题，发现对于一类比先前报道更广泛的退化轨迹，延迟测量模型存在连续对称性，导致无法唯一恢复延迟和状态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 辅助惯性导航中不同传感器测量值常存在未知的相对时间延迟，需要研究延迟和初始导航状态的可辨识性。

Method: 采用几何分析方法，研究延迟测量模型在不同轨迹结构下的可辨识性条件。

Result: 发现对于比先前报道更广泛的一类无信息（退化）轨迹，延迟测量模型存在连续对称性，阻碍了延迟和状态的唯一恢复。

Conclusion: 延迟和初始状态的可辨识性取决于辅助测量的时间结构和轨迹形式，存在比以往认知更多的退化轨迹案例。

Abstract: In aided inertial navigation, measurements from different sensors are often subject to unknown relative time delays. Consider a single aiding sensor whose measurements have an unknown but constant delay relative to the inertial-measurement data stream. We study the identifiability of the delay and the initial navigation state that parameterizes the trajectory. Identifiability depends on both the temporal structure of the aiding measurements and the form of the trajectory itself. Our geometric analysis shows that, for a larger class of uninformative (i.e., degenerate) trajectories than has previously been reported, the delayed measurement model admits a continuous symmetry that prevents unique delay-and-state recovery.

</details>


### [425] [Multi-Contact Force Estimation for Continuum Robots via Gaussian-Parameterized Factor Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29165)
*Aditya Prakash,Panagiotis Tsiotras*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于因子图与高斯混合力参数化的统一形状-力估计框架，通过融合应变、肌腱张力和位姿测量，解决了连续体机器人在未知位置多触点外力估计的病态问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连续体机器人安全运行需要准确估计任意位置的外部接触力，但未知位置的多触点力估计是一个病态问题，现有方法难以同时估计力的位置和大小。

Method: 将高斯混合力参数化引入离散化概率Cosserat杆模型，构建因子图框架，融合多种传感器测量（应变、肌腱张力、位姿），并提出了渐进式变体以按需引入基函数顺序估计接触力。

Result: 数值仿真表明，该方法在单触点和多触点场景下，对力的位置和大小估计均优于现有方法；渐进式变体在模拟受限导航任务中能顺序估计接触力。

Conclusion: 该框架有效缓解了节点级力估计的病态性，为连续体机器人在复杂环境中的安全操作提供了准确的外力感知能力。

Abstract: Continuum robots offer key advantages in navigating unstructured environments, but their safe operation requires accurate estimation of the external contact forces acting anywhere along the robot body. Estimating these forces at unknown locations is an ill-conditioned problem, particularly for multiple contacts. We propose a unified shape and force estimation framework formulated on a factor graph. By incorporating a Gaussian mixture force parameterization into a discretized probabilistic Cosserat rod model, we reduce the dimensionality of the unknown external forces and mitigate the ill-conditioning of node-wise force estimation. The framework fuses strain, tendon tension, and pose measurements to simultaneously estimate the robot's shape and external forces while accounting for modeling and sensor uncertainties. Numerical simulations demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms existing methods in terms of force location and magnitude estimation for both single and multi-contact scenarios. We further present a progressive variant that introduces basis functions on demand to estimate contact forces sequentially during a simulated confined-navigation task.

</details>


### [426] [TacGen: Touch Is a Necessary Dimension of Physical-World Representation -- Addressing Tactile Data Scarcity with Scalable Vision-to-Touch Alignment and Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29173)
*Wanghao Ye,Aarosh Das,Sihan Chen,Yiting Wang,Bowei Tian,Guoheng Sun,Shwai He,Zheyu Shen,Ziyao Wang,Yexiao He,Zhaoyi Liu,Meng Liu,Yuning Zhang,Meng Feng,Ziyi Wang,Yilong Dai,Yifei Dong,Siyuan Peng,Zhenle Duan,Joshua Liu,Lang Xiong,Ang Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出TacGen模型，通过视觉-触觉对比对齐和潜在空间残差MLP生成器缓解触觉数据稀缺问题，实验表明触觉为接触依赖性属性提供了必要的物理证据通道。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉存在物理属性模糊性，触觉可解决该问题，但触觉数据稀缺限制了多模态表征学习研究。

Method: 提出TacGen方法：结合预指定的V+T对比对齐与潜在空间残差MLP V->T生成器，从RGB合成触觉潜在表征，实现触觉数据扩展。

Result: V+T相比V-only在质量(R²+0.570)、密度(acc+0.067)、硬度(+0.117)和力标签(R²+0.281)上显著提升；TACTO操作任务从0.246提升至0.979，V-only容量扩展仅解释4.5%差异。

Conclusion: 触觉为接触依赖性属性的表征提供了必要的物理证据通道，重建质量与表征效用之间存在显著差距。

Abstract: Touch resolves the physical-property ambiguity left by vision: exploratory contact recovers shape, texture, compliance, and material, and visuo-haptic object representations converge in ventral visual cortex. We ask whether representation learning can reproduce this grounding. TacGen mitigates the tactile-data scarcity bottleneck by combining pre-specified V+T contrastive alignment with a latent-space residual-MLP V->T generator that synthesizes tactile latents from RGB for tactile-data scaling. With matched DINOv2 backbones, splits, and probes, V+T improves matched V-only on mass (Delta R^2=+0.570), density (Delta acc=+0.067), hardness (+0.117), and uncertainty-banded force labels (Delta R^2=+0.281); all CIs exclude zero. The same representation lifts matched-capacity TACTO manipulation 0.246->0.979 while V-only capacity scaling accounts for only 4.5% of the gap, preserving 95.5%. The generator reaches cross-seed +0.589, with real tactile +0.585 inside the seed interval; the architecture comparison shows a 13pp downstream gap between reconstruction quality and representation utility. Across five-seed SSVTP/TVL reproductions, YCB-Sight transfer, three-backbone checks, permutation/random-feature controls, hash-verified manifests, and measured-force validation checks, the evidence supports the claim that touch supplies a necessary physical evidence channel for representations of contact-dependent properties.

</details>


### [427] [Empowering a Single-Frequency GNSS Receiver to Achieve High-Precision Positioning with Relative Observations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29192)
*Xingpeng Wang,Ziwen Qu,Juncheng Chen,Ruitian Pang,Xiangyu Li,Tiancheng Lai,Siqi Shen,Wentao Liu,Pengfei Wang,Chao Xu,Yanjun Cao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种低成本、单频GNSS与任意相对运动传感器（如轮式编码器、相机、LiDAR）紧耦合的状态估计框架，通过滑动窗口因子图和虚拟锚点机制，实现分米级定位精度，无需物理基站，为自主导航提供高性价比替代方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RTK技术虽能实现厘米级精度，但成本高且依赖额外基础设施，限制了其在自主导航中的广泛应用。因此，需要一种更经济高效的解决方案。

Method: 提出紧耦合状态估计框架，结合单频GNSS与相对运动传感器；构建滑动窗口因子图，融合全局历元-锚点约束；引入虚拟锚点机制，首次观测卫星时将其状态锁定为虚拟参考；通过单频多模态运动先验和鲁棒的周跳恢复技术确保载波相位完整性。

Result: 在多种低成本传感器套件的真实实验中，该方法将单频接收机的定位精度从数米提升至分米级，在不同环境下均验证了有效性。

Conclusion: 该方法提供了一种准确、经济、可靠的自主导航替代方案，降低了高精度定位的门槛。

Abstract: Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) navigation is widely used to provide absolute, outdoor positioning in field robotics. Advances in Real-Time Kinematic (RTK) technology can achieve centimeter-level accuracy, facilitating autonomous navigation tasks. However, the cost and extra infrastructure used for RTK still hinder the application and more cost-effective solutions are desired. In this letter, we present a novel tightly-coupled state estimation framework that achieves high-precision localization by using low-cost, mass-market single-frequency GNSS receivers with any relative motion sensors (e.g., wheel encoder, camera, LiDAR). We propose a sliding-window factor graph that integrates generic relative motion with global epoch-to-anchor constraints derived from continuous carrier phase tracking. To eliminate the reliance on physical base stations, we introduce a virtual anchor mechanism: upon the initial observation of a satellite, its state is locked as a virtual reference to establish global epoch-to-anchor constraints. By substituting multi-frequency hardware redundancy with single-frequency multi-modal kinematic priors and a robust cycle-slip recovery technique, our approach ensures carrier-phase integrity on cheap receivers. Extensive real-world experiments on heterogeneous low-cost sensor suites validate that our method improves the accuracy of a single-frequency receiver from several meters to decimeter-level precision across diverse environments, providing an accurate, cost-effective and reliable alternative for autonomous navigation.

</details>


### [428] [Behavior Uncloning: Distilling Mode Redirection into Policy Weights without Inference-Time Steering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29201)
*Hao Wang,Jiuzhou Lei,Dayou Li,Bangya Liu,Minghui Zheng,Manling Li,Ruohan Zhang,Zhiwen Fan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MoRE是一种无需重新训练或增加推理开销的机器人策略行为重定向方法，通过短时"反克隆"步骤将策略从多模态行为重定向到期望模式，在8个任务中平均提升44%成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 行为克隆策略会从演示数据中学习多种行为模式，其中包含不安全或不期望的模式（如传递刀具时刀锋朝前）。现有方法要么需要原始数据进行完整重训练，要么增加大量推理开销，存在效率与安全性之间的空白。

Method: 提出MoRE框架，通过一个临时的模式分类器提取重定向信号，利用"反克隆"步骤将该信号蒸馏到策略权重中；同时使用保留损失（retain loss）平衡编辑过程，保持期望模式的能力，最终实现零推理开销的独立策略运行。

Result: 在8个模拟和真实世界任务中，MoRE将平均部署成功率提升44个百分点；在所有对比的适应和引导基线中取得最强效果，接近经数据筛选后重新训练的参考水平；保持任务能力和推理速度，并泛化到Diffusion Policy和Pi0.5 VLA等多种策略骨架。

Conclusion: MoRE有效解决了行为克隆策略中多模态行为的安全性问题，实现了高效、零推理开销的策略行为重定向，在多种任务和策略骨架上均表现优异。

Abstract: Behavior-cloned policies often learn multiple behavior modes from demonstration datasets, including modes that are unsafe or otherwise undesired at deployment. For example, a policy trained on diverse handover demonstrations may learn to pass a knife blade-first. Standard remedies such as data curation and inference-time steering either require access to the original demonstrations for full retraining or add substantial inference-time overhead. To address this gap, we propose MoRE(Mode Redirection), which redirects policy rollouts toward desired behavior modes through a short "uncloning" step. Specifically, MoRE distills the redirection signal from a temporary mode classifier into the policy weights to steer behavior. A retain loss balances this edit by preserving desired-mode competence, allowing the standalone policy to suppress unwanted modes with zero inference-time overhead. Across eight simulated and real-world tasks, MoRE improves the average deployment success rate (SR) by 44 percentage points over the original mixed-mode policy. Among all compared adaptation and steering baselines, MoRE achieves the strongest SR and approaches the filtered-data retraining reference, while preserving task competence and inference speed. MoRE also generalizes across robot policy backbones, including Diffusion Policy and the Pi0.5 VLA, diverse task categories, and real-world deployments.

</details>


### [429] [AnyBody: Free-Form Whole-Body Humanoid Control from Arbitrary Keypoint Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29209)
*Shuning Li,Sikai Li,Jiachen Li,Mingyu Ding*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: AnyBody是一个统一的人形机器人全身控制器，可在部署时通过任意子集的身体关键点进行驱动，无需昂贵的全身运动捕捉和轨迹重定向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法要么依赖昂贵的全身运动捕捉和易出错的轨迹重定向，限制了数据收集和策略学习的可扩展性；要么将上下半身控制分解为独立的层次化表示，牺牲了全身协调运动。

Method: 1) 训练一个特权教师跟踪器，在线蒸馏为确定性编码器-解码器学生网络；2) 训练带掩码自注意力的Transformer关键点编码器，对齐到特权潜在空间；3) 在潜在空间中用轻量级残差修正器实现下游任务特化。

Result: 在任意关键点子集的全身运动跟踪、自由形式控制、灵活遥操作以及下游行为（行走、空中写字、障碍物到达）中均有效。

Conclusion: AnyBody通过统一的潜在运动表示实现了任意关键点子集驱动的全身人形控制，为可扩展的数据收集和策略学习提供了一种有效方案。

Abstract: We present AnyBody, a unified whole-body humanoid controller driven by an arbitrary subset of body keypoints chosen at deploy time. Prior physics-based trackers either rely on expensive full-body motion capture and error-prone trajectory retargeting, which bottleneck scalable data collection and policy learning, or decompose upper- and lower-body control into separate hierarchical representations, sacrificing the coordinated whole-body motions that loco-manipulation requires. We close this gap by learning a single latent motion representation that any keypoint subset can address. To achieve this, we first train a privileged teacher tracker on a large unstructured motion corpus and distill it online into a deterministic encoder-decoder student whose latent space is a unit sphere. We then train a transformer keypoint encoder that admits any subset of body keypoints through masked self-attention, aligning it to the privileged latent. Additionally, we treat the frozen decoder as a motor prior and specialize downstream tasks with a lightweight residual corrector in the latent space. We demonstrate the effectiveness of AnyBody by tracking large-scale human motions from arbitrary keypoint subsets, free-form control, flexibly teleoperating, and learning downstream behaviors including locomotion, in-air writing, and obstacle-reach.

</details>


### [430] [CORE Planner: Contextual-memory Oriented Reinforcement-learning in Unknown Environments for Robot Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29222)
*Jintao Kong,Zhihao Zhang,Weihuang Chen,Liming Chen,Zhongyu Guo,Shuaiyu Liu,Hongbin Sun*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为CORE Planner的上下文记忆强化学习导航方法，结合传统方法与学习方法的优势，通过稀疏可见图表示环境、Transformer实现全局理解，并引入图稀疏化和上下文记忆机制，在仿真和真实环境中均实现零样本迁移，性能显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自主导航方法中，传统规划方法依赖手工规则，而学习方法存在环境记忆有限和仿真到真实迁移困难的问题。

Method: 采用稀疏可见图进行结构化环境表示降低计算开销；利用Transformer网络实现整体环境理解；提出基于可见图的图稀疏化方法和上下文记忆机制缓解局部最优并提升大规模场景计算性能。

Result: 在各类环境中一致优于FAR Planner等传统方法和所有学习基线，旅行距离较FAR Planner减少13%，较学习基线最多减少48%；在复杂环境中优势更大；真实场景中实现零样本迁移且无需人工干预。

Conclusion: CORE Planner有效融合了传统方法与学习方法的优势，在未知环境导航中实现了高效、鲁棒且可零样本迁移到真实世界的性能。

Abstract: Autonomous navigation in unknown environments requires a robot to efficiently reach a predefined goal while exploring without prior maps. Although progress has been made in this area, most existing works still rely on traditional planning methods with hand-crafted rules, while learning-based methods often suffer from limited environmental memory and challenges in simulation-to-real (sim-to-real) transfer. To overcome these limitations, we propose a Contextual-memory Oriented Reinforcement-learning (CORE) planner for robot navigation in unknown environments. The proposed CORE planner effectively combines the core advantages of traditional and learning-based methods. Specifically, our method uses a sparse visibility graph for structured environment representation, reducing the computational overhead of dense grid maps, and employs a Transformer network to achieve a holistic environmental understanding, thereby significantly improving navigation efficiency. Moreover, we introduce a visibility graph-based graph sparsification method and a contextual memory mechanism, which alleviates local optima and enhances computational performance in large-scale scenes. Finally, our approach achieves zero-shot sim-to-real transfer after training solely on image-based environments, requiring no fine-tuning. Experimental results show that CORE Planner consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, including the traditional FAR Planner and all learning-based baselines, across representative environments, reducing travel distance by 13\% over traditional FAR Planner and by up to 48\% relative to learning-based baselines, with larger gains observed in more complex environments. In real-world scenarios, CORE successfully navigates without human intervention, showcasing zero-shot sim-to-real transfer. Code is available at https://github.com/BBD00/core_planner.

</details>


### [431] [MoPe: Motion Permanence for Robust Monocular Gaussian Mapping in Dynamic Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29237)
*Qixin Xiao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出运动持久性（Motion Permanence）原则，并基于此构建MoPe系统，通过记忆感知的不确定性滤波方法，在单目高斯溅射SLAM中消除动态物体产生的鬼影伪影，提升在动态环境中的定位鲁棒性和地图质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有不确定性感知的单目高斯SLAM方法将动态区域视为逐帧观测，导致"无记忆"——当行人减速、停留或被遮挡后重现时，当前帧可能误判为静态，动态内容被吸收到地图中，产生持久鬼影伪影。作者认为这是表征层面的不匹配问题。

Method: 提出运动持久性原则（Motion Permanence），即物体的动态身份应随时间持续存在，而非逐帧独立判定。实现为MoPe系统：通过几何一致的SE(3)变换传播历史动态后验，结合有界贝叶斯log-odds更新与当前帧证据融合，生成持久后验，用于指导跟踪、建图、动态感知高斯插入和高斯级后清理。

Result: 在Wild-SLAM、Bonn和TUM序列上，MoPe提升了跟踪鲁棒性，减少了残留鬼影。在最直接违反无记忆假设的动态人体场景中效果最为显著。

Conclusion: 在场景表征内部维护时序动态状态，是迈向更可靠的面向表征自主系统在变化现实世界中运行的实用步骤。

Abstract: Robust robot autonomy depends on scene representations that remain stable enough to support localization, navigation, and downstream decision making in dynamic environments. Monocular Gaussian Splatting SLAM provides high-fidelity mapping, but current uncertainty-aware methods still treat dynamic regions largely as per-frame observations. This makes the representation effectively memoryless: when a pedestrian slows, pauses, or reappears after occlusion, the current frame may look static, allowing dynamic content to be absorbed into the map and leaving persistent ghosting artifacts. We argue that this failure reflects a representation-level mismatch. Dynamic-ness is not an instantaneous appearance property, but a temporal property defined by motion history. Building on this view, we introduce Motion Permanence: the principle that an object's dynamic identity should persist over time rather than be re-decided from each frame independently. We realize this principle in MoPe, a memory-aware uncertainty filter for monocular Gaussian mapping. MoPe propagates the historical dynamic posterior through geometry-consistent SE(3) warping and fuses it with current-frame evidence using bounded Bayesian log-odds updates. The resulting persistent posterior guides tracking, mapping, dynamic-aware Gaussian insertion, and Gaussian-level post-cleanup. On Wild-SLAM, Bonn, and TUM sequences, MoPe improves tracking robustness and reduces residual ghosting, with the strongest gains on dynamic-human scenes that most directly violate the memoryless assumption. These results show that maintaining temporal dynamic state inside the scene representation is a practical step toward more reliable representation-centric autonomy in changing real-world environments.

</details>


### [432] [PL-LIT: A LiDAR-Inertial-Thermal SLAM Using Point-Line Features and Thermographic Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29259)
*Jiawei Xia,Yixiao Feng,Yongliang Shi,Chao Gao,Renjing Xu,Weining Lu,Bin Liang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出PL-LIT系统，结合光度标定与深度学习点线特征提取，解决热成像光度不一致导致的里程计退化问题，实现LiDAR-惯性-热成像多传感器融合SLAM，在可见光和热红外场景均达到最优性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 热成像在强光、低光照、雾等恶劣条件下具有鲁棒性，但热像仪的自动增益控制（AGC）导致图像全局对比度低、亮度恒常性假设不成立，使得传统基于光流跟踪的视觉里程计不可靠。

Method: 提出PL-LIT系统：(1) 在线光度标定模块，补偿热成像亮度变化；(2) 深度神经网络提取点线特征，提升热像中特征的稳定性和可重复性；(3) 基于误差状态迭代卡尔曼滤波（ESIKK）的紧耦合LiDAR-惯性-热成像状态估计；(4) 线特征约束方案，适应热成像外观变化；(5) 概率热强度体素地图，支持实时热异常检测。

Result: 在可见光环境下表现通用性和鲁棒性，在长距离热红外数据集上达到最优性能，并具备基于热成像地图的实际安全检测功能。

Conclusion: PL-LIT有效克服热成像光度不一致问题，实现了多传感器融合的SLAM系统，在多种环境下均有优异表现，并拓展了热异常检测的实际应用价值。

Abstract: Thermal imaging is resilient to adverse conditions, such as intense illumination, low-light operation, and fog, and can therefore mitigate odometry degradation when visible-spectrum imagery becomes unreliable. Nevertheless, most thermal cameras employ automatic gain control (AGC), and thermal images often present low global contrast despite containing informative edge structures. These characteristics undermine brightness constancy and cause conventional optical flow tracking-based odometry pipelines that fundamentally rely on the brightness constancy assumption across consecutive frames. To address these issues, we propose a general LiDAR-Inertial-Thermal SLAM system that accommodates both visible-light and thermal cameras. PL-LIT combines an online photometric calibration module with a deep neural network for point-line feature extraction, enabling more stable and repeatable thermal tracking. For state estimation, we design a tightly coupled LiDAR-Inertial-Thermal formulation within an Error-State Iterated Kalman Filter (ESIKF). We further introduce a line-feature constraint scheme ensuring the reliability of geometric constraints across varying thermal appearances. In addition, PL-LIT builds a probabilistic thermal-intensity voxel map, which supports real-time thermal anomaly detection. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PL-LIT exhibits generality and robustness in visible-light environments, achieves state-of-the-art performance on long-range thermal infrared datasets, and provides practical safety inspection functionality based on thermographic mapping.

</details>


### [433] [LAMP: Long-Horizon Adaptive Manipulation Planning for Multi-Robot Collaboration in Cluttered Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29358)
*Shuai Zhou,Yorai Shaoul,Jiaoyang Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出LAMP框架，包含LAMPA*和LAMP-Lazy两种规划器，用于解决密集环境下的长时域多机器人协同操作规划问题，通过结合生成式操作模型实现耦合空间的高效搜索。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法（端到端强化学习或简化代理问题）无法扩展到长时域、高密度环境下的多机器人协同操作问题。

Method: 提出LAMP框架，包含LAMPA*规划器（系统搜索耦合的物体-机器人空间）和LAMP-Lazy规划器（通过延迟评估实现实时重规划），结合学习到的生成式操作模型。

Result: 在挑战性仿真环境中，该方法解决了先前方法无法处理的高密度复杂长时域任务。

Conclusion: LAMP框架通过结合生成式模型与两种搜索策略，有效解决了多机器人长时域操作规划的可扩展性问题，实现了在极端密集环境下的可行规划。

Abstract: Multi-robot manipulation requires jointly reasoning about contact formations, robot motions under coupled dynamics, and collision avoidance. Systematically searching over this large space is difficult and becomes increasingly intractable as the number of robots grows, the task horizon lengthens, or the scene becomes more cluttered. Existing approaches therefore either learn to solve the problem end-to-end via reinforcement learning or restrict planning to a simpler surrogate problem, such as planning object motions while learning short-horizon contact primitives. However, neither paradigm scales to the problem instances we target: longhorizon multi-robot manipulation in extremely dense environments. In this paper, we propose a Long-horizon Adaptive Manipulation Planning (LAMP) framework with two planners that enable tractable search over the full coupled space by combining a learned generative manipulation model: a LAMPA* planner that systematically searches over the coupled objectrobot space, and LAMP-Lazy: a lazy planner that enables real-time replanning through deferred evaluation. Experiments in challenging simulated environments demonstrate that our approach solves complex long-horizon tasks in highly cluttered environments that prior methods cannot handle.

</details>


### [434] [SPACE: Swarm Pheromone Fields for Adaptive Collision-Aware Exploration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29372)
*Haohua Que,Haojia Gao,Mingkai Liu,Qian Zhang,Jiajun Sun,Fei Qiao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出SPACE方法，利用信息素场实现大规模地面机器人集群的安全高效探索，在保持近乎最优覆盖时间的同时，大幅降低机器人间碰撞率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模机器人集群在拥挤环境（如门廊、密集通道）中，额外机器人的边际收益递减，且碰撞率上升，存在安全与效率的权衡问题。

Method: 受蚂蚁觅食启发，SPACE维护一个共享环境场，包含吸引性的前沿信息素、排斥性的探索信息素和快速机器人密度场，实现去中心化协调。

Result: 在HouseExpo和KTH数据集上测试多达256台机器人，SPACE处于经验帕累托前沿，碰撞率比贪婪最近前沿规划器低4-17倍，覆盖时间仅相差约2%。

Conclusion: 在此规模下，协调主要提升安全性而非缩短覆盖时间。

Abstract: Massive robot swarms can explore unknown environments quickly, but adding robots eventually stops helping. Doorways and dense traffic create congestion, increasing inter-robot contacts and reducing the value of each additional robot. We study this safety-efficiency tradeoff for ground swarms of tens to hundreds of robots. We present SPACE, Swarm Pheromone Fields for Adaptive Collision-Aware Exploration. Inspired by ant foraging, SPACE maintains a shared environmental field with an attractive frontier pheromone, a repellent explore pheromone, and a fast robot-density field. Coordination is decentralized and mediated through this field. We evaluate SPACE on real building floorplans, namely sixteen home layouts from the HouseExpo dataset and eight campus floors from the KTH dataset, with swarms of up to two hundred and fifty-six robots. SPACE lies on the empirical Pareto frontier. It attains the lowest inter-robot contact rate at every congested swarm size, four to seventeen times fewer than a greedy nearest-frontier planner, while keeping coverage time within about two percent of that near time-optimal planner. The results indicate that, at this scale, coordination mainly improves safety rather than coverage time.

</details>


### [435] [Understanding LLM Intervention Explanations in Multi-Party Human-Robot Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29460)
*Micol Spitale,Massimiliano Nigro,Emily Cross*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本研究探究了由LLM驱动的社交机器人在多人互动中如何决定何时及为何介入，通过对24组（66名学生）实验中的610条介入解释进行主题分析，发现了五种主要解释主题，并揭示了不同机器人角色（推进者与反对者）在介入策略上的差异化模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM越来越多地被嵌入社交机器人以支持自然群体互动，但它们在复杂的多人场景中的角色尚未被充分探索，尤其不清楚LLM驱动的机器人如何决定何时以及为何介入群体对话。

Method: 开展了一项组间实验，涉及24组（66名大学生）在三人两机器人的多人互动场景中，比较了同质条件（两个机器人角色相同，均为推进者）与异质条件（两个机器人角色不同，分别为推进者和反对者）。在每个对话轮次，LLM协调器决定是否介入并生成文本解释，最终对610条介入解释进行了主题分析。

Result: 识别出五种反复出现的解释主题，发现解释以促进为导向，强调共识、参与和互动流畅性。模式在不同条件下保持稳定，但角色分化特征显现：推进者支持协调，而反对者驱动目标导向的介入。

Conclusion: 这些发现通过刻画LLM驱动系统如何在实时多人人机交互中证明介入决策的合理性，为可解释AI领域做出了贡献。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly embedded in social robots to support natural group interactions, yet their role in complex multi-party settings remains underexplored. In particular, it is unclear how LLM-driven robots decide when and why to intervene in group conversations. This paper investigates the intervention explanations generated by an LLM-based orchestrator in a multi-party interaction involving three human participants and two robots. We conducted a between-subjects study with 24 groups (66 university students), comparing a homogeneous condition (two robots with the same role, i.e., a mover) and a heterogeneous condition (two robots with different roles, i.e., a mover and an opposer). At each conversational turn, the LLM orchestrator decided whether to intervene and generated a textual explanation of its decision. We performed a thematic analysis of 610 intervention explanations, identifying five recurring themes. Results show that explanations are facilitation-oriented, emphasizing agreement, participation, and interaction flow. While patterns remain stable across conditions, role differentiation emerges: the mover supports coordination, whereas the opposer drives goal-oriented interventions. These findings contribute to explainable AI by characterizing how LLM-driven systems justify intervention decisions in real-time, multi-party human-robot interaction.

</details>


### [436] [MTD-Map: Single-Stage Long-Term LiDAR Map Maintenance Framework via Mixture Transition Distribution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29469)
*TaeYoung Kim,Gilhwan Kang,Tae Ihn Kim,Seungwon Song,Hun Keon Ko*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出MTD-Map，一种单阶段地图维护框架，通过混合转移分布建模同时处理动态物体移除和变化检测，无需独立模块。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有地图维护研究集中在特定任务（如动态物体移除或变化检测），缺乏统一框架，导致模块冗余和效率低下。

Method: 利用混合转移分布(MTD)显式编码占用转换的方向和持续时间；提出递归MTD公式将历史占用模式编码为增强状态以捕捉高阶时间依赖；采用稳定性驱动的自适应策略平衡噪声抑制与准静态结构保留。

Result: 鲁棒地移除动态物体，在变化检测任务上表现有竞争力，并降低了计算成本。

Conclusion: MTD-Map以统一的单阶段框架有效解决了动态物体移除和变化检测两个任务，验证了方法的鲁棒性和高效性。

Abstract: While robust map maintenance has advanced significantly, existing studies have focused on specific tasks, especially dynamic object removal or change detection. In this paper, we take a holistic view of the map maintenance problem and propose MTD-Map, a single-stage framework that handles both dynamic object removal and change detection without separate task-specific modules. MTD-Map employs an explicit representation that compactly encodes the direction and duration of occupancy transitions through Mixture Transition Distribution (MTD) modeling. We develop a recursive MTD formulation that encodes historical occupancy patterns into an augmented state to capture high-order temporal dependencies. Furthermore, a stability-driven adaptive strategy balances noise suppression with the preservation of quasi-static structures. Extensive experiments verify that MTD-Map robustly removes dynamic objects and achieves competitive change detection performance, subsequently reducing computational costs. Our project page is available at: https://taeyoung96.github.io/mtd_map/.

</details>


### [437] [Learning Transferable Dynamics Priors from Action to World Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29501)
*Ze Huang,Jiahui Zhang,Hairuo Liu,Chenxi Zhang,Ran Cheng,Li Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出A2World，一种基于动作条件的世界模型，通过在大规模机器人操作数据上预训练多视图交互基础扩散世界模型，学习可迁移的动态先验。该模型可适配为专用仿真器（A2World-sim）用于策略评估和假设分析，也可适配为视频-动作联合预测模型（A2World-policy）用于动作预测。实验证明动作条件的预训练世界模型对基于仿真器和基于策略的机器人学习均有帮助。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索动作条件世界建模作为一种可扩展的方法，用于学习机器人学习中可迁移的动态先验，使世界模型能够捕获超越外观级视频生成的可复用交互动态。

Method: 在大规模机器人操作数据上预训练多视图交互基础扩散世界模型A2World；然后分别适配为专用仿真器A2World-sim（用于长程推演和策略评估）和视频-动作联合预测模型A2World-policy（在视觉和指令条件下预测动作）。

Result: 在仿真基准和真实机器人环境中的实验表明，动作条件的世界模型预训练能够产生可迁移的动态先验，对基于仿真器的学习和基于策略的学习均有显著效果。

Conclusion: 动作条件的世界模型预训练是一种有效的策略，能够学习可迁移的动态先验，在机器人学习的两个互补方向（仿真器评估和策略预测）上均有良好的泛化能力。

Abstract: We study action-conditioned world modeling as a scalable way to learn transferable dynamics priors for robot learning. By pretraining a model to predict how actions drive visual scene evolution, the resulting world model captures reusable interaction dynamics beyond appearance-level video generation. Concretely, we pretrain a multi-view interactive base diffusion world model, A2World, on large-scale robot manipulation data with real action annotations. We validate the learned dynamics priors from two complementary perspectives. First, we adapt A2World into a task- or scene-specialized real-world simulator, A2World-sim, whose long-horizon rollouts support simulator-based policy evaluation and scalable what-if analysis by replacing real-robot rollouts with world model rollouts. Second, starting from the same pretrained weights, we adapt A2World into a video-action joint prediction model, A2World-policy, that predicts actions under visual and instruction conditioning. Experiments across simulation benchmarks and real-robot settings demonstrate that action-conditioned world model pretraining yields transferable dynamics priors that benefit both simulator-centric and policy-centric robot learning.

</details>


### [438] [CORE: Common Outcome Regularities from Action-Free Visual Demonstrations for Robot Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29517)
*Juyi Sheng,Jincheng Li,Mingxin Tan,Mengyuan Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: CORE是一种从无动作视觉演示中提取通用结果规律的政策学习框架，通过终端状态编码和视觉目标原型注入，显著提升机器人操作成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人模仿学习依赖昂贵的机器人演示数据，而丰富的无动作视觉演示（如人类视频）因缺少可执行动作且存在具身差距而难以利用。

Method: 首先训练终端结果编码器（含对比学习和辅助时序目标），然后聚合成功终端嵌入形成视觉目标原型，最后将这些原型作为全局目标条件注入机器人策略中。

Result: 在Meta-World、RoboTwin 2.0和真实世界操作中，CORE分别将策略基线平均成功率提升了+3.9、+11.1和+17.0个百分点，且优于文本条件变体。

Conclusion: 视觉目标原型相比语言指令能为任务完成提供更具体的几何和物理约束，有效弥补了具身差距。

Abstract: Robot imitation learning often relies on costly robot demonstrations, while abundant action-free visual demonstrations, such as human videos, are difficult to use because they lack robot-executable actions and suffer from embodiment gaps. We propose CORE, a policy learning framework that extracts Common Outcome Regularities from visual demonstrations. Rather than transferring explicit actions across embodiments, CORE exploits a key observation: although successful trajectories for the same task can be diverse, their terminal states often share stable object configurations, spatial relations, and contact constraints. CORE first trains a terminal outcome encoder with contrastive and auxiliary temporal objectives, then aggregates successful terminal embeddings into visual goal prototypes, and finally injects these prototypes as global goal conditions into robot policies. Compared with language instructions, visual goal prototypes provide more concrete geometric and physical constraints for task completion. Across Meta-World, RoboTwin 2.0, and real-world manipulation, CORE improves the average success rate of the corresponding policy backbones by up to +3.9, +11.1, and +17.0 percentage points, respectively, and outperforms text-conditioned variants under the evaluated settings.

</details>


### [439] [Analyzing Uncertainty in the Spatial Representation of the Kinematic Bicycle Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29566)
*Shafayat Abrar,M. Zaeem Baig,Shahir Ul Islam Anzal,Abdul Basit Memon*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文通过泰勒级数线性化方法，推导了后轮自行车运动学模型在不确定性下的协方差矩阵闭式解，并通过蒙特卡洛仿真验证了准确性，首次完整给出了该模型的协方差矩阵构成，对自主车辆定位与路径规划有重要意义。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主车辆在不确定环境中定位和确定朝向是关键挑战，传感器数据存在噪声，导致位姿不确定性需用协方差矩阵表示。由于运动学模型的非线性，实时计算协方差矩阵十分困难，现有研究对相关协方差矩阵构成的描述不完整或不正确。

Method: 采用泰勒级数对非线性三角函数进行线性化，推导随机变量的闭式期望表达式，从而得到后轮自行车运动学模型在车轮位移和转向角不确定性下的协方差矩阵近似演化。通过蒙特卡洛仿真验证解析结果的准确性。

Result: 解析结果与蒙特卡洛仿真结果高度一致，首次完整且正确地给出了该车辆模型协方差矩阵各组成部分的闭式表达。

Conclusion: 研究成果有助于识别离散化运动学模型及其随机分析的潜力与约束，所提方法可用于移动机器人和自主车辆的同步定位与里程计自标定。

Abstract: Locating a vehicle and determining its orientation in an uncertain environment is a critical challenge in autonomous vehicle navigation and path planning. To address these challenges, a vehicle estimates its pose while depending on sensor data that offer noisy measurements. These uncertainties in pose quantities are expressed mathematically as a covariance matrix. The real-time computation of the covariance matrix is critical because of the non-linearity involved in the kinematic model. The challenge is thus to evaluate the evolution of the covariance matrix of a vehicle's discretized stochastic kinematics.
  The purpose of this study is to obtain a near-accurate evolution of the covariance matrix of the rear-wheel bicycle kinematic model under uncertainties in wheel displacement and steering angle. We used Taylor's series to linearize the nonlinear trigonometric functions and provided closed-form expectations of random variables with the required accuracy. Our analytical findings are in good agreement with those obtained from Monte-Carlo simulations. Our contribution is probably the first detailed closed-form presentation of the covariance matrix constituents of the vehicle under evaluation, which were previously reported either incorrectly or incompletely. These findings aid in identifying the potential and constraints of the discretized kinematic model as well as its stochastic analysis. The techniques presented here are useful for the simultaneous localization and odometry self-calibration of certain mobile robots and autonomous vehicles.

</details>


### [440] [Hierarchical Policy Learning via Spectral Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29570)
*Shuxin Cao,Liquan Wang,Walker Byrnes,Yiye Chen,Yilun Du,Animesh Garg*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出因果频谱策略（CSP），通过离散余弦变换将机器人动作分解为低频粗运动和高频细修正，实现从粗到细的因果动作生成，在精密度操作任务中优于强基线方法，并对噪声演示具有鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法未充分利用动作序列中的语义分解结构，即任务级运动意图与执行级精修之间的差异，导致在精密度敏感操作任务上表现不佳。

Method: 利用离散余弦变换（DCT）将动作序列分解为低频粗运动和高频细修正；提出因果频谱策略（CSP），以从观察到语言的条件生成粗运动，再基于已实现的粗轨迹生成细粒度修正；同时提出类人遥操作噪声注入作为数据增强方法。

Result: 在仿真和真实世界评估中，CSP在精密度敏感操作任务上持续优于强基线方法；所提出的噪声注入方法使模型对噪声演示表现出强鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 频谱域中的粗-细分解有效捕捉了机器人动作的结构化语义，因果粗到细生成策略能够提升精密度操作性能，并且对遥操作噪声具有鲁棒性。

Abstract: In this paper, we identify a semantic decomposition in robot action sequences, separating task-level motion intent from execution-level refinements. By analyzing actions in the spectral domain using the discrete cosine transform (DCT), we observe that low-frequency components capture global motion trajectories, while high-frequency components encode precise timing, alignment, and contact behaviors. Motivated by this structure, we propose Causal Spectral Policy (CSP), which models action generation as a causal coarse-to-fine process: coarse motion is predicted from observation and language, and fine corrections are generated conditionally on the realized trajectory. Across simulation and real-world evaluations, CSP consistently outperforms strong baselines on precision-sensitive manipulation tasks. Additionally, we propose human-inspired teleoperation noise injection as a data augmentation method, under which our approach demonstrates strong robustness to noisy demonstrations.

</details>


### [441] [Privacy-Preserving Decentralized Cooperative Localization with Range-Only Measurements: A Convex Optimization Based Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29673)
*Nitesh Kumar,Reyshwanth Ganeshan,Sixu Li,Sivakumar Rathinam,Swaroop Darbha*

Main category: cs.RO
