TL;DR: 提出了一种基于凸优化的原生隐私保护去中心化协同定位（DCL）框架，通过半定规划（SDP）计算最大体积内接椭球体（MVE），利用新颖的交集平面约束和局部线性矩阵不等式（LMI）分解，仅交换抽象对偶变量实现定位，在保证隐私的同时提升了精度与可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统协同定位需在网络上共享显式空间坐标，在隐私敏感任务中存在严重安全隐患；现有隐私保护方法要么通过噪声注入降低精度，要么依赖计算量巨大的密码学协议，缺乏高效且不失精度的隐私保护方案。

Method: 采用严格有界测量噪声假设，通过半定规划（SDP）计算最大体积内接椭球体（MVE）；引入由地标测量导出的新型交集平面约束以收紧个体空间界；将耦合约束分解为局部线性矩阵不等式（LMI），智能体仅交换抽象对偶变量，避免传输显式原始位置估计。

Result: 在3D蒙特卡洛仿真中，所提DCL框架在精度上优于现有基于SDP的定位方法，同时保障了操作隐私，并保持高度可扩展和可并行化的计算特性。

Conclusion: 所提出的原生隐私保护去中心化协同定位框架成功在隐私、精度与计算效率之间取得了更优平衡，为GPS拒止环境下的多机器人系统提供了一种可行方案。

Abstract: Cooperative localization using range-based measurements is critical for multi-robot systems operating in GPS-denied and unstructured environments. However, traditional cooperative approaches require sharing explicit spatial coordinates across the network, presenting a severe security vulnerability in privacy-sensitive missions. While recent literature has explored privacy-preserving alternatives, these methods typically rely on accuracy-degrading noise injection or computationally prohibitive cryptographic protocols. To overcome these limitations, we propose a novel, natively privacy-preserving Decentralized Cooperative Localization (DCL) framework based on convex optimization. Discarding probabilistic noise models, we assume strictly bounded measurement noise and formulate the localization problem via Semi-Definite Programming (SDP) to compute a Maximum-Volume Inscribed Ellipsoid (MVE). Our approach introduces novel intersection-plane constraints derived from landmark measurements to significantly tighten individual spatial bounds. To incorporate inter-robot range measurements securely, we uniquely decompose coupling constraints into localized Linear Matrix Inequalities (LMIs). Agents achieve fleet-wide spatial consensus by iteratively exchanging only abstract dual variables, completely avoiding the transmission of explicit primal position estimates. Extensive 3D Monte Carlo simulations demonstrate that our DCL framework outperforms existing SDP-based localization method in accuracy, while guaranteeing operational privacy and maintaining highly scalable, parallelizable computation.

</details>


### [442] [Lateral String Stability for Vehicle Platoons](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29677)
*Sixu Li,Swaroop Darbha,Yang Zhou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了基于弧长（欧拉）视角的横向串稳定性新框架，证明了仅依靠车载传感无法保证路径跟踪误差的衰减，而V2V通信能够实现真正的误差衰减，为CAV编队安全提供了理论基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 纵向串稳定性已被广泛研究，但横向串稳定性（路径跟踪误差在编队中的传播）尚未得到充分探索。随着自动驾驶车辆依赖车载传感和无地图导航，传感器遮挡和密集编队使安全问题更加突出，亟需建立横向串稳定性的理论框架。

Method: 采用弧长（欧拉）视角替代传统分析方法，研究路径上固定点的跟踪误差如何在车辆间传播。提出了横向串稳定性的正式定义，并设计了两种控制策略：仅依赖车载传感的控制器和利用V2V通信的"向前车学习"方法。

Result: 仅依靠车载传感无法保证路径跟踪误差的衰减，存在根本性的安全局限；而V2V通信能够实现真正的误差衰减。

Conclusion: 该框架直接解决了安全关键的路径相对跟踪误差问题，支持在相同道路几何下进行一致的车辆间比较，为CAV编队的横向安全控制提供了理论指导。

Abstract: Connected and automated vehicle (CAV) platooning promises gains in energy efficiency and traffic throughput and, most critically, in safety. These safety benefits hinge on string stability, which determines how disturbances propagate along a platoon. While longitudinal string stability is well studied, lateral string stability, which governs the propagation of path-tracking errors that can lead to unsafe deviations from the intended path, remains underexplored. Its importance is increasing as autonomous vehicles rely more heavily on onboard sensing and map-free navigation, where sensor occlusion and dense formations amplify safety risks. This paper presents a new framework for lateral string stability that directly addresses safety-critical path-relative tracking errors and enables consistent comparison across vehicles following the same road geometry. Central to this framework is an arc-length (Eulerian) viewpoint, a departure from traditional analyses, that clarifies how tracking errors at a given point on the path propagate from one vehicle to the next. A formal definition of lateral string stability is introduced along with two control strategies: an onboard-sensing-only controller and a novel learn-from-predecessor approach utilizing vehicle-to-vehicle (V2V) communication. We show that onboard sensing alone cannot guarantee attenuation of path-tracking errors, imposing a fundamental safety limitation, whereas V2V communication enables true error attenuation.

</details>


### [443] [Real-Time Compliance and Position Control of a Hyper-redundant Soft Robotic Arm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29731)
*Runze Zuo,Tianhua Zou,Naike Wu,Mingyuan Li,Daniel Bruder*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种具有7连杆、6个关节、12个独立驱动旋转轴的气动肌肉拮抗驱动机器人手臂，实现了对末端位置和刚度的同步量化控制，并通过统一逆运动学-逆刚度控制器在物理实验和仿真中验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软体机器人具有良好顺应性，但难以精确控制末端位置和刚度；而传统刚性机器人精度高但缺乏物理顺应性。为了在非结构化环境中同时实现精确运动和被动顺应，需要一种能同时量化控制位置和顺应性的机器人架构。

Method: 设计了一种7连杆6关节机器人手臂，每个关节由一对拮抗气动肌肉驱动，提供12个独立驱动旋转轴，可同时调节角度和刚度。提出统一的迭代逆运动学-逆刚度控制器，实现任务空间下位置和顺应性的同步量化控制。

Result: 在物理手臂和仿真中验证了运动学和刚度模型及控制律的有效性。通过仿真研究了框架在不同手臂形态下的扩展性。成功完成了在移动白板上写字时抵抗干扰、以及钥匙插入和开抽屉时被动纠正隐藏错位等任务。

Conclusion: 该算法引导的结构设计使得在简单控制器下即可完成对传统刚性和软体手臂都具有挑战性的任务，证明了结构设计与控制算法协同的优势。

Abstract: Robots working in unstructured or partially unobservable environments must combine accurate motion with physical compliance that can passively correct contact misalignment. Soft robots provide this compliance but have struggled to precisely control their tip compliance and position. This paper presents a robot architecture designed around that control problem: a 7-link arm whose six articulated joints provide twelve independently driven revolute axes, each actuated by an antagonistic pair of pneumatic muscles, so that every axis can simultaneously change its angle and linearly adjust its stiffness. The rigid articulated backbone makes the tip compliance and position of the arm predictable enough to be commanded quantitatively in real time. The robot employs a unified iterative inverse-kinematics and inverse-compliance controller to achieve simultaneous, quantitative control of both compliance and position. The task-space compliance and kinematics models and the control law are derived and verified on both the physical arm and a matched simulation. Simulation is then used to study how the same framework extends to other arm morphologies. Finally, the arm demonstrates tasks that have been difficult for both rigid and soft arms: rejecting disturbances while writing on a moving whiteboard, and passively correcting hidden misalignment during a key-insertion and drawer-opening task. That these tasks succeed under so straightforward a controller is evidence for the advantage of this algorithm-informed structural design.

</details>


### [444] [MyGO-Splat: Multi-Objective Closed-Loop Geometric Feedback for RGB-Only Gaussian SLAM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29738)
*Fan Zhu,Ziyu Chen,Zhenjun Zhao,Zhisong Xu,Hui Zhu,Mingrui Li,Chunmao Jiang,Javier Civera*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MyGO-Splat是一个闭环高斯SLAM框架，通过将高斯原语光栅化为像素级深度和法线，实现地图主动监督相机位姿优化，并引入尺度感知自适应对齐来桥接单目先验与尺度一致性，仅使用单目输入即可达到类似RGB-D方法的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实时单目SLAM存在尺度模糊和缺乏几何自校正的问题，现有的RGB-only系统是开环的，深度先验注入建图后无法有效回馈跟踪漂移。

Method: 提出闭环高斯SLAM框架，将高斯原语光栅化为像素级深度和表面法线以监督相机位姿优化；引入尺度感知自适应对齐，将基础模型深度估计投影到全局优化的高斯空间中，形成尺度反馈的自校正循环。

Result: 闭环设计提升了尺度稳定性和外观-几何一致性，仅使用单目输入即可达到与RGB-D方法相当的性能。

Conclusion: 通过闭环反馈机制有效解决了单目SLAM的尺度模糊和跟踪漂移问题，实现了高质量的单目高斯SLAM。

Abstract: Real-time monocular Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) fundamentally suffers from scale ambiguity and a lack of geometric self-correction. While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables high-fidelity rendering, existing RGB-only systems remain open-loop because depth priors are injected into mapping but refined geometry cannot effectively regulate tracking drift. We present MyGO-Splat, a closed-loop Gaussian SLAM framework that analytically rasterizes Gaussian primitives into pixel-wise depth and surface normals, allowing the map to actively supervise camera pose optimization. To bridge monocular priors and scale consistency, our framework introduces scale-aware adaptive alignment that projects foundation-model depth estimates into the globally optimized Gaussian space, forming a self-correcting cycle for scale feedback. Extensive evaluations show that this closed-loop design improves scale stability and appearance-geometry consistency, achieving performance comparable to RGB-D methods while using only monocular input.

</details>


### [445] [Multi-UAV Formation Cooperative Obstacle Avoidance and Adaptive Shape Deformation Control in Complex Environments Based on BI-APF-RRT and Affine Transformation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29755)
*Yiliang Wu,Weican Chen,Yendo Hu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种融合BI-APF-RRT和仿射变换的多无人机编队协同避障算法，解决了复杂障碍环境下编队灵活性与完整性难以共存的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多无人机编队在复杂障碍环境中运动时，避障灵活性与编队完整性难以共存，且传统人工势场法易陷入局部最优。

Method: 1）采用目标偏置双向APF-RRT算法进行全局无碰撞路径规划，结合改进人工势场和三次B样条插值提升路径平滑性与快速收敛性；2）利用仿射变换矩阵（非均匀缩放和旋转）使编队根据障碍物距离自适应变形；3）通过分布式控制律使跟随者追踪领导者，编队不解体地安全穿越复杂障碍区域。

Result: 编队能够在沿最优路径运动的同时根据障碍物距离自适应变形，安全穿越复杂障碍区域且不解体。

Conclusion: 所提算法有效兼顾了编队避障灵活性与结构完整性，克服了传统APF的局部最优问题。

Abstract: Aiming at the problem that obstacle avoidance flexibility and formation integrity are difficult to coexist in multi-UAV formation motion in complex obstacle environments , and that the traditional artificial potential field (APF) method easily falls into local optima, a cooperative obstacle avoidance algorithm for multi-UAV formations integrating BI-APF-RRT and affine transformation is proposed. First, abandoning the traditional APF centroid path planning method , a goal-biased Bidirectional Artificial Potential Field method RRT (BI-APF-RRT) algorithm is adopted to conduct global collision-free path planning for the centroid of the leader formation. By introducing an improved artificial potential field and cubic B-spline interpolation, the smoothness and rapid convergence of the global path are ensured. Secondly, using the generated global path as the guiding trajectory for the formation's centroid , combined with an affine transformation matrix (including non-uniform scaling and rotation) , the formation can adaptively deform based on the distance to obstacles while moving along the optimal path. Finally, the followers track the leaders through a distributed control law , enabling the entire formation to safely cross complex obstacle areas without disassembling.

</details>


### [446] [Cross-Spectral Stereo Inertial Odometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29757)
*Seungsang Yun,Hyunsoo Jang,Tai Hyoung Rhee,Hyunho Song,Hyeonjae Gil,Ayoung Kim*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种异步实时的跨光谱视觉-热-惯性（VTI）系统，通过时间解耦高延迟深度匹配与高速状态估计，并引入光谱感知加权方案和热非均匀性校正处理机制，解决了传统立体VIO在退化环境中的光谱冗余问题，在标定日光和视觉退化场景下均展现出优越的鲁棒性和精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统立体VIO依赖单光谱基线，存在光谱冗余导致的双传感器同时失效风险，而现有跨光谱深度匹配方法延迟过高，无法满足实时性要求。

Method: 1) 异步架构将高延迟的深度匹配与高速的状态估计在时间上解耦；2) 光谱感知加权方案基于光熵和热噪声动态调整模态依赖；3) 热非均匀性校正（NUC）无缝处理机制以保持跟踪连续性。

Result: 在多样场景下的实验表明，系统克服了光谱冗余，在标定日光下精度优越，同时在视觉退化环境中保持鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 该跨光谱VTI系统有效解决了单光谱VIO的结构性局限，为退化环境下的视觉里程计提供了一种实时、鲁棒的解决方案，代码与数据已开源。

Abstract: Standard stereo VIO focuses exclusively on the benefit of metric scale via single-spectrum baselines, often overlooking the risks of spectral redundancy. This structural limitation leads to correlated failures, where both sensors simultaneously fail in degraded environments that affect their shared spectrum. Leveraging a cross-spectral system presents a complementary solution to this issue, yet the significant appearance gap between modalities renders standard matching ineffective. Existing deep learning-based matchers, while effective, introduce inference latencies that violate real-time constraints. To bridge this gap, we present an asynchronous real-time cross-spectral visual-thermal-inertial (VTI) system that temporally decouples high-latency deep matching from high-rate state estimation. Our architecture incorporates a spectral-aware weighting scheme that dynamically balances modality reliance based on photometric entropy and thermal noise, ensuring robustness against both abrupt lighting changes and thermal artifacts. Furthermore, we introduce a seamless handling mechanism for thermal Non-uniformity Correction (NUC) to maintain tracking continuity. Extensive experiments across diverse scenarios confirm that our system overcomes spectral redundancy, yielding superior accuracy in nominal daylight while ensuring robustness in visually degraded environments. We will open source our code and data: https://github.com/seungsang07/cross-spectral-stereo-inertial-odometry

</details>


### [447] [Trajectory Optimization for Collision-Aware Redundant Robotic Multi-Axis Additive Manufacturing by Constrained Gradient Projection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29766)
*Zhikai Shen,Jiasheng Qu,Chenyu Xu,Zhuo Huang,Chengkai Dai,Yongzhe Li,Guoxin Fang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于冗余机器人多轴增材制造的碰撞感知轨迹优化框架，通过相对雅可比和可微SDF碰撞模型，在严格沉积位置约束下实现长程无碰撞轨迹优化，实验在8-DOF平台上达到10μm定位精度、77.6%的关节冲击减小和10.2倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 冗余机器人多轴增材制造虽能实现无支撑和共形制造，但长程轨迹优化在严格的沉积位置约束和时变碰撞约束下仍具有挑战性。

Method: 1) 利用相对雅可比公式化喷嘴-工件相对运动学；2) 开发可微SDF碰撞模型以捕捉制造过程几何演化并提供优化梯度；3) 通过迭代投影到自运动流形上，将沉积位置作为硬航路点等式约束强制执行，损失梯度限制在相应切空间内。

Result: 在8-DOF机器人MAAM平台上，平均喷嘴位置误差低于10μm，最大关节冲击减少77.6%，消除了所有采样碰撞和方向违规，相比SQP基线获得10.2倍加速，物理制造实验验证了复杂几何体的成功打印。

Conclusion: 该方法有效解决了冗余机器人多轴增材制造中长程轨迹优化的关键难题，实现了高精度、平滑、无碰撞的轨迹生成，并显著提升了制造质量与计算效率。

Abstract: Redundant robotic multi-axis additive manufacturing (MAAM) enables support-free and conformal fabrication, but trajectory optimization for long-horizon paths remains challenging under strict deposition-position constraints and time-varying collision constraints. This work proposes a computational framework for collision-aware trajectory optimization in redundant robotic MAAM. We first formulate nozzle-workpiece relative kinematics using a relative Jacobian, and develop a differentiable SDF-based collision model that captures fabrication-induced geometry evolution and provides optimization gradients. The deposition position is then enforced as a hard waypoint-wise equality constraint through iterative projection onto the self-motion manifold, with the loss gradient restricted to the corresponding tangent space. Experiments on an 8-DOF robotic MAAM platform with diverse long-horizon support-free and conformal toolpaths show that our method maintains a mean nozzle-position error below 10μm, reduces maximum joint jerk by up to $77.6\%$, and eliminates all sampled collision and orientation violations. Compared with the SQP-based baseline, it achieves up to a 10.2x speedup and improved convergence. Physical fabrication experiments further verify that the resulting smooth, collision-free trajectories enable successful printing of complex geometries with fewer visible deposition artifacts.

</details>


### [448] [Analytic Concept-Centric Memory for Agentic Embodied Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29774)
*Mingyang Sun,Xiujian Liang,Jiude Wei,Qichen He,Donglin Wang,Cewu Lu,Jianhua Sun*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于分析概念的记忆框架，通过结构化概念（语义部件、参数化模板、姿态、可操作性、状态）组织经验，支持长时程具身操纵中的对象记忆、状态跟踪和技能复用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有具身智能体的记忆以非结构化历史或嵌入记录存储，难以检索与操纵相关的对象部件、物理状态、动作效果和可执行技能，导致长时程任务表现不佳。

Method: 构建分析概念记忆框架：用语义部件、参数化模板、姿态、可操作性和操纵状态表示对象；连接对象/场景记忆与转换记忆（动作引起的状态变化）和技能记忆（模板/策略驱动的执行）；运行时采用结构化粗到细检索。

Result: 在记忆依赖操纵、铰接物体泛化、真实世界记忆评估和消融实验中，方法在任务完成率、检索精度、对象重识别和跨对象技能泛化上均优于非结构化和基于嵌入的记忆基线。

Conclusion: 结构化分析概念记忆能有效提升具身操纵智能体在长时程任务中的记忆利用效率和技能复用能力。

Abstract: Long-horizon embodied manipulation requires agents to remember persistent objects, track changing scene states, and reuse prior interaction knowledge. However, existing agent memories are often stored as unstructured histories or embedding-based records, making it difficult to retrieve manipulation-relevant object parts, physical states, action effects, and executable skills. We propose an analytic concept-centric memory framework for agentic embodied manipulation. Our memory organizes experience around structured analytic concepts, where objects are represented by semantic parts, parametric templates, grounded poses, affordances, and manipulation states. It further connects object and scene memories with transition memory for action-induced state changes and skill memory for template-grounded and policy-grounded execution. At runtime, the agent performs structured coarse-to-fine retrieval to identify relevant objects, states, transitions, and skills, supporting state-consistent reasoning and skill reuse. Experiments on memory-dependent manipulation, articulated-object generalization, real-world memory evaluation, and ablations show that our approach improves task completion, retrieval accuracy, object re-identification, and cross-object skill generalization over unstructured and embedding-based memory baselines.

</details>


### [449] [FalconTrack: Photorealistic Auto-Labeled Perception and Physics-Aware Vision-Based Aerial Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29783)
*Yan Miao,Karteek Gandiboyina,Noah Giles,Hideki Okamoto,Bardh Hoxha,Georgios Fainekos,Sayan Mitra*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: FalconTrack是一个统一的感知与跟踪框架，利用可编辑的高斯泼溅仿真器自动生成大规模标注数据（约10k张/20分钟），结合多头感知与物理感知的扩展卡尔曼滤波跟踪，在真实硬件上实现25Hz的零样本仿真到现实迁移，跟踪成功率达100%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于视觉的空中跟踪在GPS受限环境中至关重要，但大多数逼真数据集依赖繁重的手动标注，耗时且成本高。现有方法缺乏高效的自动化标签生成手段来支撑大规模感知训练。

Method: 1) 在高斯泼溅仿真器中构建自动化标注管线，从短物体视频中分离目标高斯并与随机背景合成，生成RGB、掩码、类别和6-DoF位姿标签；2) 设计多头感知模块，采用分阶段学习和重投影一致性训练；3) 结合类别条件动力学先验的扩展卡尔曼滤波进行跟踪，实现零样本仿真到现实迁移。

Result: 在三个几何多样物体和两个环境上，零样本仿真到现实迁移的类别准确率达96-100%；真实硬件闭环视觉跟踪中，系统运行约25Hz，在两个环境的五条轨迹上F1-tenth和门跟踪成功率100%，而掩码中心基线在快速视野外场景下降至60%。

Conclusion: FalconTrack通过自动化标注与物理感知融合，实现了高效、高鲁棒性的零样本仿真到现实迁移，显著优于基线方法，在GPS受限环境下的空中跟踪任务中具有实用价值。

Abstract: Vision-based aerial tracking is critical in GPS-denied environments. Reliable perception for tracking depends on large-scale labeled data, yet most photorealistic datasets rely on heavy manual annotation and are time-consuming to produce. We present FalconTrack, a unified perception-and-tracking framework that (i) leverages a photorealistic editable simulator for automated label generation and (ii) combines multi-head perception with physics-aware tracking for zero-shot sim-to-real transfer. FalconTrack provides an automated labeling pipeline in a Gaussian Splatting simulator that isolates target Gaussians from short object videos and composites them with randomized backgrounds to generate RGB, mask, class, and 6-DoF pose labels, producing about 10k labeled images in under 20 minutes. Using this dataset, we train a multi-head perception module with staged learning and reprojection consistency, and fuse its outputs with class-conditioned dynamics priors in an EKF for tracking. Our perception model outperforms two baselines and reaches 96-100% class accuracy in zero-shot sim-to-real transfer on three geometrically diverse objects and two environments, while maintaining consistent performance in unseen simulated and real scenes. In real hardware closed-loop visual tracking, the onboard system runs at about 25 Hz and achieves 100% success in sim-to-real F1-tenth and gate tracking in five trajectories across two environments, while a mask-centered vision baseline drops to 60% success on F1-tenth during fast out-of-view scenarios.

</details>


### [450] [Data-Driven Modeling and Control for Tethered Space Systems with Koopman-Informed Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29825)
*Ao Jin,Yifeng Ma,Panfeng Huang,Fan Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Koopman图动力学(KGD)框架，通过融合Koopman算子的全局线性演化与图神经网络的局部拓扑先验，有效建模绳系空间系统的结构动力学，并基于此开发模型预测控制策略，在柔性绳网地面实验中展现了高精度建模能力和无需重训练的空间泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 绳系空间系统中的柔性部件（如绳、空间网）具有高维、强耦合和非线性动力学特性，传统数据驱动方法在长期预测稳定性和空间泛化方面表现不佳，亟需更有效的建模与控制方法。

Method: 提出Koopman图动力学(KGD)框架，将Koopman算子的全局线性演化与图神经网络的局部拓扑先验相结合，并基于此开发了KGD模型预测控制(MPC)策略。

Result: 地面实验表明该方法在柔性绳和空间网上具有高精度建模能力，且模型仅在小尺度配置上训练后，能够成功预测和控制显著更大的、未见过的物理尺度，无需重新训练；轨道仿真验证了其有效性。

Conclusion: KGD框架有效解决了绳系空间系统建模中的长期预测稳定性与空间泛化难题，为柔性结构动力学控制提供了新思路。

Abstract: Modeling tethered space systems is critical for advanced orbital operations. Flexible components such as tethers and space nets are integral to these systems but present significant control challenges due to their high dimensional, strongly coupled, and nonlinear dynamics. While data driven methods offer alternative modeling approaches, they frequently struggle with long term predictive stability and spatial generalization. To address this, we propose the Koopman Graph Dynamics (KGD) framework to learn the structural dynamics by integrating the global linear evolution of the Koopman operator with the local topological priors of Graph Neural Networks. Building upon this representation, we develop a KGD based Model Predictive Control strategy for tethered space systems. Subsequently, the ground experiments on flexible tether and space net demonstrate the high precision modeling capabilities of the proposed method. Crucially, the framework exhibits exceptional capacity for spatial transfer without retraining. Models trained exclusively on small configurations successfully predict and control significantly larger, unseen physical scales. Furthermore, the orbit simulations within a physics engine verify the effectiveness of the proposed approach for tethered space systems.

</details>


### [451] [STEAM: Self-Supervised Temporal Ensemble Advantage Modeling for Real-World Robot Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29834)
*Zhihao Liu,Qiuyi Gu,Yitao Wang,Dongming Qiao,Yixian Zhang,Shuaihang Chen,Liangzhi Shi,Tianxing Zhou,Zefang Huang,Kang Chen,Zhen Guo,Quanlu Zhang,Jincheng Yu,Xiaodan Liang,Guoliang Fan,Yu Wang,Feng Gao,Xinlei Chen,Chao Yu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: STEAM是一种无需标签的自监督时间集成优势建模方法，通过集成时间偏移预测器从专家演示中学习帧级优势，用于区分机器人操作中的有效进展与失败行为，在多个真实世界任务中显著提升策略成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人学习中混合了有效进展与停滞、纠正、次优行为的异构数据，需要能够区分局部可靠进展与失败/倒退的帧级优势信号。

Method: 训练一个集成的时间偏移预测器，在专家轨迹的帧对上使用归一化时间偏移作为自监督信号，每个预测器输出偏移分布并转换为标量优势，取集成中最小优势对混合质量数据进行保守评分。

Result: 在双人毛巾折叠、芯片结账、可乐补货和单臂拾放任务中，STEAM结合CFGRL相比基线分别提升成功率59%、54.3%、23%和16.2%。

Conclusion: STEAM能有效识别停滞、失败和恢复行为，通过保守评分策略显著提升机器人策略学习性能。

Abstract: Real-world robot learning increasingly relies on heterogeneous data, but demonstrations and rollouts often mix useful progress with stalls, corrections, and suboptimal behavior. Effective policy learning therefore requires frame-level advantages that distinguish reliable local progress from failures and regressions. We propose Self-supervised Temporal Ensemble Advantage Modeling (STEAM), a label-free method that learns such advantages from expert demonstrations. STEAM trains an ensemble of temporal-offset predictors on frame pairs within expert trajectories, using the normalized temporal offset between two frames as a self-supervised signal. Each predictor maps a frame pair to a distribution over temporal offsets, which is converted into a scalar advantage. STEAM then takes the minimum advantage across the ensemble to score mixed-quality rollout data conservatively. Across real-world bimanual towel folding, chip checkout, cola restocking, and single-arm pick-and-place tasks, STEAM identifies stalls, failures, and recoveries. When combined with CFGRL, STEAM further improves policy success rate by 59%, 54.3%, 23% and 16.2% over baselines, respectively.

</details>


### [452] [Legible Shared Autonomy: Implicit Communication of Robot Belief through Motion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29846)
*Jinwei Liu,Pengfei Li,Shaofeng Chen,Tao Wang,Yun-Bo Zhao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出在共享自主系统中引入可读运动，让机器人动作既能朝向目标又能清晰揭示其推断的目标，从而增强用户对机器人信念的理解，减少用户控制负担。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统共享自主系统在多个目标方向相近时，辅助运动具有歧义性，用户无法感知机器人是否理解正确，导致两种问题：正确时用户过度控制浪费精力，错误时用户难以及时发现并纠偏。

Method: 将可读运动（legible motion）融入共享自主，机器人动作同时兼顾目标推进和意图揭示；通过置信度感知的自适应权威分配，在置信时提供果断的可读辅助动作，不确定时增加用户权威，实现透明双向协作。

Result: 通过仿真和六自由度机械臂实物实验表明，可读共享自主相比标准方法显著提升了用户对机器人信念的理解，并减少了用户控制努力。

Conclusion: 可读共享自主能够将传统单向辅助转变为透明的双向人机协作，提升交互效率与用户信任。

Abstract: Shared autonomy systems combine user input with autonomous assistance to help users with motor impairments control robot arms to perform everyday manipulation tasks, by inferring user goals and providing appropriate guidance. However, the robot's internal beliefs about user goals cannot be observed by users. Traditional shared autonomy systems provide assistance along efficient shortest paths toward inferred goals, but when multiple objects lie in similar directions, such assistive motion remains ambiguous and fails to reveal the specific goal identified by the robot. This creates two critical problems. First, when the robot correctly infers the goal, users continue controlling because they cannot perceive understanding from ambiguous assistive motion, wasting effort when autonomous completion would suffice. Second, when the robot misunderstands intent, users cannot quickly detect errors until assistive motion diverges significantly, requiring substantial corrective input. We address this by introducing legible motion into shared autonomy, where robot actions must both advance toward the goal and clearly reveal which goal has been inferred, enabling users to understand the robot's beliefs and adjust control accordingly. The robot modulates communication strength through confidence-aware adaptive authority allocation by providing assertive legible assistive actions when confident while increasing user authority when uncertain, transforming shared autonomy into transparent bidirectional collaboration. User studies including simulation and physical experiments with a six-degree-of-freedom robot arm demonstrate that legible shared autonomy significantly improves users' understanding of robot beliefs and reduces user control effort compared to standard shared autonomy.

</details>


### [453] [TACO: A Test and Check Framework for Robust Pose Graph Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29851)
*Emilio Olivastri,Alberto Pretto,Tobias Fischer*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: TACO是一个用于PGO(SLAM)系统的鲁棒优化框架，通过IPC在线一致性评估和Switchable Outlier Sanitization周期性异常清理两个互补组件，增量式地逼近最大一致测量集，在2D和3D SLAM数据集上展现出与离线方法相当的鲁棒性和在线部署所需的计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PGO方法对异常值（由感知混淆导致的错误回环检测）极为敏感，这些异常值会严重降低轨迹估计质量，现有方法难以在保持在线计算效率的同时有效过滤异常值。

Method: 提出TACO框架，包含两个互补组件：(i) 测试组件——增量概率一致性(IPC)算法，用于在线评估每个新回环约束的一致性；(ii) 检查组件——可切换异常值净化(Switchable Outlier Sanitization)，利用现有Switchable Constraints定期清理IPC可能错误包含的不一致测量。

Result: 在2D和3D视觉SLAM数据集上，异常率高达50%时，成功率分别超过90%和83%，平均收敛时间分别为约45ms和100ms，鲁棒性可与离线方法媲美，同时保持在线部署所需的计算效率。

Conclusion: TACO通过测试与检查的双组件设计，在不显式建模测量为内点或异常点的情况下，实现了鲁棒性与计算效率的良好平衡，适合在线SLAM系统部署。

Abstract: Pose Graph Optimization (PGO) is one of the most widely adopted approaches for solving Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) problems. However, PGO approaches are particularly sensitive to outliers, which can substantially degrade the quality of the estimated trajectories. These outliers arise from incorrect place recognition associations caused by perceptual aliasing in the environment. In this paper, we present TACO (short for Test And Check Optimization), a robust optimization framework designed to filter out outliers from PGO systems. Rather than explicitly modeling measurements as inliers or outliers, TACO finds an approximation to the maximally consistent set of measurements incrementally through two complementary components: (i) The test component, namely the Incremental Probabilistic Consensus (IPC) algorithm, evaluates the consistency of each incoming loop closure online. (ii) The check component dubbed Switchable Outlier Sanitization leverages the existing Switchable Constraints to periodically sanitize any inconsistent measurements from the consistent set that IPC may have mistakenly included. We evaluate TACO on 2D SLAM and 3D Visual SLAM datasets against several state-of-the-art methods. The results show robustness comparable to state-of-the-art offline methods while preserving the computational efficiency required for online deployment, achieving a success rate above 90% in 2D and 83% in 3D across outlier rates up to 50%, with mean convergence times of approximately 45 ms and 100 ms, respectively. We release an open-source implementation of our method with this paper.

</details>


### [454] [Normalizing Flow-Enhanced Message Passing for Multirobot Collaborative Localization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29868)
*Han Shen,Guanghui Wen,Liangming Chen,Ming Cao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种融合高斯置信传播和平均场近似的分布式协同定位消息传递算法，通过可学习的归一化流梯度估计器处理非线性测量模型，并扩展至李群状态空间，在无人艇多机器人定位任务中展现出更高的精度、鲁棒性和自适应性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分布式协同定位方法在处理非线性测量模型和噪声统计估计时存在局限性，且标准线性化或采样方法精度不足，因此需要一种更准确、鲁棒且自适应的算法。

Method: 提出统一GBP和MF的消息传递算法：GBP保持机器人状态间的依赖关系，MF估计噪声统计；采用参数化公式通过梯度估计器处理非线性测量模型中的非共轭项；设计了基于归一化流的可学习梯度估计器；通过端到端训练根据MP行为调整NF参数；并将方法扩展至李群状态空间以支持旋转状态估计。

Result: 在多机器人协同定位任务中（融合里程计、GNSS和UWB测距），在无人艇仿真和实际实验中验证了该方法在精度、鲁棒性和自适应性上的改进。

Conclusion: 提出的算法通过统一GBP-MF框架、NF梯度估计器及李群扩展，有效提升了分布式协同定位的性能，为实际机器人应用提供了更可靠的定位方案。

Abstract: Accurate, robust, and adaptive localization is essential for various robotic operations. This paper proposes a new message passing (MP) algorithm for realizing collaborative localization in a distributed manner. The algorithm unifies Gaussian belief propagation (GBP) and mean-field (MF) approximation, where GBP preserves dependencies among robot states, and MF enables estimation of noise statistics. To effectively handle non-conjugate terms from nonlinear measurement models, the algorithm adopts a parametric formulation in which these terms are treated by gradient estimators. Beyond linearization and sampling, we further design a normalizing flow (NF)-based gradient estimator, enabling learnable sampling. End-to-end training tunes NF parameters according to the behavior of MP, improving the overall estimation performance. To support estimation of practical robotic states that involve rotations, the method is then extended to Lie group state spaces. Finally, the method is applied to multirobot localization task fusing odometry, global navigation satellite system (GNSS) measurements, and inter-robot ultra wideband (UWB) ranging. Simulations and experiments on autonomous surface vehicles (ASVs) demonstrate its improved accuracy, robustness, and adaptability.

</details>


### [455] [AUSLUN: A Fixed-Hover UAV--USV System for GNSS-Denied Maritime Search and Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29875)
*Siyuan Yang,Zikai Jia,Hailiang Kuang,Xiaoyu He,Qizhi Guo,Yihao Dong,Shaoming He*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出AUSLUN系统，利用固定悬停无人机通过变焦吊舱、多边形感知扫描和门控递归估计器，在GNSS拒止环境下实现无人水面艇对非合作目标的搜索、定位与导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GNSS拒止环境下，无人水面艇无法进行远距离船舶发现和全局参考导航，需要替代方案。

Method: 固定悬停无人机通过视觉-惯性里程计自定位，采用多边形感知环形吊舱扫描、模态感知的方位-距离定位、以及目标相对制导与视觉丢失恢复三环节闭环。使用门控递归估计器融合激光测距（非合作目标）和数据链距离（合作USV）。

Result: 自适应偏航边界相比固定扇区扫描减少扫描时间和冗余覆盖；门控递归估计器在定位精度上优于非递归基线方法；完整海上任务验证了搜索到导航的全流程及视觉丢失恢复能力。

Conclusion: 该工作证明了固定悬停无人机辅助在沿海GNSS拒止环境下对静止目标接近的可行性和操作边界。

Abstract: Global navigation satellite system (GNSS) denial can prevent an unmanned surface vehicle (USV) from both finding a distant vessel and maintaining a globally referenced approach. This paper presents AUSLUN (Automatic UAV Search, Localization, and USV Navigation), a fixed-hover aerial-surface system that uses a coastal unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV), which estimates its own pose through visual-inertial odometry (VIO), as a long-range sensing and navigation anchor. The central design shifts sensing motion from UAV translation to a zoom pod and closes the loop through three coupled elements: polygon-aware annular pod scanning, modality-aware bearing-range localization, and target-relative USV guidance with visual-loss recovery. The same gated recursive estimator uses laser range for the non-cooperative target and datalink range for the cooperative USV. Search-planning simulations show that the adaptive yaw bounds reduce scan time and redundant coverage relative to a matched fixed-sector scan, and GPS-referenced field data show that the gated recursive estimator outperforms non-recursive baselines in localization accuracy. An integrated maritime mission further demonstrates the complete search-to-navigation sequence, including a deliberately triggered visual-loss recovery. These results establish the feasibility and operating boundary of fixed-hover UAV assistance for stationary-target approach in coastal GNSS-denied environments. The source code and a video demonstration are publicly available at https://github.com/xirhxq/pod_search and https://youtu.be/S-5RkJs35JI.

</details>


### [456] [Trust Your Instincts: Confidence-Driven Test-Time RL for Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29892)
*Siyao Chen,Jiakang Yuan,Jiaxin Wang,Tao Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出T^2VLA，一种无需外部环境反馈的测试时强化学习框架，通过利用VLA模型自身的高置信度生成轨迹作为内在奖励信号，实现策略自提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RL方法依赖外部环境反馈和预定义成功信号来指导策略更新，这限制了VLA模型在缺乏外部奖励场景下的应用。

Method: 提出T^2VLA框架：(1)利用轨迹级与高置信度专家演示的相似度作为内在奖励；(2)提出置信度驱动的双专家引导机制，动态平衡局部伪专家（探索）和全局专家池（稳定性）。

Result: 在LIBERO和RoboTwin基准上，T^2VLA持续超越监督基线，性能接近使用真实奖励的Oracle RL，且适用于OpenVLA-OFT和pi系列等多种VLA范式。

Conclusion: VLA模型具备内部评估能力，T^2VLA可无需外部奖励实现有效的策略自提升，为VLA的自我改进提供了新方向。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become indispensable for pushing Vision-Language-Action Models (VLAs) beyond static imitation learning. However, existing RL methods typically require external environmental feedback, relying on predefined success signals to guide policy updates. In this work, we show that VLA models possess useful internal evaluative capabilities: in discrete-action VLAs, trajectories with higher generation confidence are significantly more likely to succeed. Based on this observation, we introduce T^2VLA (Test-time VLA), an architecture-agnostic test-time RL framework that enables VLA models to achieve self-bootstrapping policy improvement. Instead of relying on external rewards, T^2VLA leverages trajectory-level similarity to high-confidence expert demonstrations as an intrinsic reward signal. In addition, we propose a Confidence-Driven Dual Expert Bootstrapping mechanism, which dynamically balances a Local Pseudo-Expert for exploration and a Global Expert Pool for training stability. Extensive experiments on the LIBERO and RoboTwin benchmarks show that T^2VLA consistently outperforms supervised baselines and approaches oracle RL performance with ground-truth rewards, achieving effective improvement without external reward feedback. Furthermore, T^2VLA adapts to distinct VLA paradigms, including both OpenVLA-OFT and the pi series.

</details>


### [457] [Critical Interval MSE: Toward Reliable Offline Validation for Robot Manipulation Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29898)
*Haoxu Huang,Tongsam Zheng,Yifan Chen,Jiacheng You,Yang Gao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Critical Interval MSE (CI-MSE)，一种离线验证指标，通过将误差计算限制在任务关键片段并结合动作对齐，显著提升了验证误差与真实 rollout 表现之间的相关性（Spearman相关系数-0.87 vs 原始MSE的-0.61）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 真实世界评估是机器人策略的黄金标准，但成本高、难复现且过于稀疏，难以可靠比较相近模型变体。现有的离线代理（如验证损失）与真实表现相关性差，亟需一种既简单又可靠的离线验证指标来加速策略迭代。

Method: 提出Critical Interval MSE (CI-MSE)指标，核心思路是：(1) 将误差计算限制在任务关键的时间片段（Critical Intervals）；(2) 配合简单的动作对齐（action-alignment）步骤，更好地匹配实际 rollout 时的行为。

Result: 在仿真和真实实验中，CI-MSE相比原始MSE显著提升了验证误差与 rollout 表现之间的相关性。在多种策略检查点上，CI-MSE的Spearman秩相关系数达到-0.87（理想值为-1），远优于原始MSE的-0.61，且对超参数选择具有鲁棒性。

Conclusion: CI-MSE是一种简单、可靠的离线验证工具，能有效加速机器人策略的迭代过程。论文还分析了其在评估分布偏移下的有效性，并给出了该指标的设计边界建议。

Abstract: Real-world evaluation is the gold standard for robot policies because it tests them against the physical conditions and deployment challenges they are ultimately designed to handle. However, real-world evaluation is also the bottleneck for iterating on robot policies: it is costly, difficult to reproduce, and often too sparse to reliably compare nearby model variants. A straightforward proxy for performance is validation loss on expert demonstrations, but this proxy is often poorly correlated with real-world performance. In this paper, we introduce Critical Interval MSE (CI-MSE), an intuitively simple yet effective offline validation metric. CI-MSE restricts error computation to task-critical segments and pairs it with simple action-alignment procedures that better match rollout-time behavior. Across simulation and real-world experiments, CI-MSE yields a stronger correlation between validation error and rollout performance than raw MSE. Across a wide range of policy checkpoints, CI-MSE achieves a Spearman's rank correlation of $-0.87$, much closer to the ideal value of $-1$ than raw MSE's $-0.61$, demonstrating a significant improvement. We show through sensitivity analysis that our metric is robust to a wide range of hyperparameters. We further study the effectiveness of CI-MSE under evaluation distribution shifts and suggest design boundaries when using this metric. In summary, this paper provides a simple and reliable offline validation tool for accelerating policy iteration. Project webpage: https://ci-mse.github.io/

</details>


### [458] [Pondering the Way: Spatial-perceiving World Action Model for Embodied Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29908)
*Hong Chen,Daqi Liu,Zehan Zhang,Haiguang Wang,Tianhao Lu,Longfei Yan,Haiyang Sun,Fangzhen Li,Hongwei Xie,Bing Wang,Guang Chen,Hangjun Ye,Yihua Tan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SWAM是一个任务导向的联合观测-动作生成框架，通过单次推理同时生成RGB-D序列和动作轨迹，显著优于两阶段规划器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有世界模型规划器采用验证中心范式，存在候选依赖、计算开销大、采样动作与预测视觉不一致等问题。

Method: 提出SWAM框架：1) 基于起始和目标RGB观测进行单次推理，联合生成中间RGB-D序列和动作轨迹；2) 训练时使用深度伪标签学习空间先验，推理时仅需单目RGB；3) 视觉引导的动作精炼模块和轨迹尺度正则化损失实现动作与视觉的细粒度对齐。

Result: 在成功率、轨迹精度和推理效率上显著超越当前最优的两阶段规划器，并展现出对未知环境的鲁棒零样本泛化能力。

Conclusion: SWAM通过任务中心的联合生成范式有效解决了传统验证中心方法的核心缺陷，实现了更高效、更一致的视觉导航规划。

Abstract: Existing world model-based planners for visual navigation typically follow a verification-centric paradigm, decoupling goal intent from trajectory synthesis. This approach suffers from candidate dependence, heavy computational overhead, and inconsistencies between sampled actions and predicted visuals. To address these issues, we propose SWAM (Spatial-perceiving World Action Model), a task-centric joint observation-action generation framework. Given start and goal RGB observations, SWAM performs single-pass inference to simultaneously generate intermediate RGB-D sequences and corresponding action trajectories, promoting goal-consistent trajectory generation and improved spatial feasibility. While SWAM leverages depth pseudo-labels during training to internalize spatial priors, it requires only monocular RGB input at inference time. We further introduce a visual-guided action refinement module and a trajectory-scale regularization loss to enforce fine-grained alignment between motion and visual cues while stabilizing predictions across varying distances. Extensive experiments show that SWAM significantly outperforms state-of-the-art two-stage planners in success rate, trajectory accuracy, and inference efficiency, while demonstrating robust zero-shot generalization to unseen environments.

</details>


### [459] [Sphere-VIO: Fast and Robust Visual-Inertial Odometry via Unified Spherical Representation for Heterogeneous Multi-Camera Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29910)
*Yueteng Yang,Yusen Xie,Hao Wei,Qianhao Wang,Boyu Zhou,Fei Gao,Jun Ma,Jinni Zhou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Sphere-VIO 提出了一种基于统一球面表示的多相机视觉-惯性里程计框架，通过球面全景模型、深度引导的半直接跟踪和适配 ESKF 后端，实现了异构多相机系统在精度、鲁棒性、效率和跨相机通用性上的优异平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 VIO 算法通常针对固定相机配置设计，缺乏对异构多相机系统的统一兼容性；同时缺少统一的跨相机表示与关联机制，难以在鲁棒的跨相机特征追踪、稳定的深度估计和可靠实时性之间取得平衡。

Method: 1) 提出统一球面全景模型(USPM)，支持所有标准相机模型，实现多相机图像与共享球面空间的双向快速映射；2) 设计并行加速的深度引导半直接跟踪管道(HOFA)，通过全局球面约束实现鲁棒跨相机匹配；3) 开发多相机适配的 ESKF 后端，采用球面承载残差和 Schur 补边缘化降低计算开销。

Result: 在公开基准和自定义全向数据集上的实验表明，Sphere-VIO 在精度、鲁棒性、效率和跨相机通用性之间实现了优越的平衡。

Conclusion: Sphere-VIO 有效解决了异构多相机 VIO 中的跨相机表示与关联难题，为资源受限设备上的实时状态估计提供了轻量级且通用的解决方案。

Abstract: Multi-camera visual-inertial odometry (VIO) overcomes the inherent limitations of pure visual systems by expanding the field of view. However, existing algorithms are typically tailored for fixed camera setups and lack unified compatibility with heterogeneous multi-camera systems. Meanwhile, due to the absence of a unified cross-camera representation and association mechanism, current methods struggle to achieve a balance among robust cross-camera feature tracking, stable depth estimation, and reliable real-time performance. To address these issues, we present Sphere-VIO, a lightweight filter-based VIO framework with unified spherical representation for heterogeneous multi-camera systems. Specifically, we first propose a Unified Spherical Panorama Model (USPM) that supports all standard camera models and enables bidirectional fast mapping between multi-camera images and a shared spherical space without sequential stitching, simplifying cross-camera feature management and improving triangulation efficiency. Second, we design a parallel-accelerated depth-guided semi-direct tracking pipeline, namely Hierarchical Omnidirectional Feature Alignment (HOFA), with global spherical constraints for robust cross-camera matching, and fuse multi-camera depth observations into a standard depth filter for stable initialization. Finally, we develop a multi-camera-adapted ESKF backend that employs spherical bearing residuals and Schur complement marginalization to minimize computational overhead, enabling accurate real-time state estimation on resource-constrained devices. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks and a custom omnidirectional dataset show that Sphere-VIO achieves superior trade-offs between accuracy, robustness, efficiency, and cross-camera generality.

</details>


### [460] [Flying to Image-Specified Objects: 3D Quadrotor Navigation via Cross-Graph Memory and Viewpoint Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29917)
*Junjie Gao,Yuqi Chen,Yongzhou Pan,Yaosheng Deng,Jiaping Xiao,Mir Feroskhan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于四旋翼无人机的层次化导航框架，通过视角感知的动作节点和轻量级语义记忆，实现了实例级图像目标导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将实例级图像目标导航扩展到四旋翼无人机面临连续3D控制、有限视野和安全约束的挑战，导航成功高度依赖于选择信息丰富的视角。

Method: 提出层次化导航框架，分离高层决策与低层运动执行；生成视角感知的动作节点（围绕前沿区域和潜在目标）；构建轻量级语义记忆保存物体级和观察级上下文；使用学习策略选择最优动作节点；轨迹规划器生成可行3D飞行路径。

Result: 仿真实验一致优于强基线方法，真实四旋翼飞行实验验证了框架的实用性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 层次化框架能有效解决四旋翼实例级图像目标导航中的视角选择和安全飞行问题，在仿真和真实场景中均表现良好。

Abstract: Instance-Specific Image-Goal Navigation (InstanceImageNav) requires a robot to navigate toward the exact object instance depicted in a query image. Extending this task to quadrotors is challenging due to continuous 3D control, limited field of view (FOV), and safety constraints, which make successful navigation highly dependent on selecting informative viewpoints. We propose a hierarchical navigation framework for quadrotor InstanceImageNav that separates high-level decision making from low-level motion execution. Instead of navigating directly to spatial locations, the system generates viewpoint-aware action nodes around frontier regions and potential target objects, enabling the robot to explore while maintaining informative viewpoints for detecting the target instance. A lightweight semantic memory maintains object-level and observation-level context, allowing semantic cues to propagate to candidate action nodes for decision making. A learning-based policy selects the most promising action node, and a trajectory planner generates dynamically feasible 3D flight paths for safe execution. Experiments in simulation demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines, and real-world quadrotor flights validate the practicality and robustness of the proposed framework.

</details>


### [461] [RoamFlow: Reinforcement-Aligned One-Step Action MeanFlow Policy for Image-Goal Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29934)
*Zixuan Zhang,Yuqi Chen,Junjie Gao,Siyuan Song,Yongzhou Pan,Beichen Wang,Mir Feroskhan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RoamFlow是一个基于MeanFlow的生成式导航框架，通过两阶段训练（专家模仿+强化学习）实现高效图像目标导航，在仿真和真实机器人上均表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有强化学习方法难以建模长程依赖关系，导致轨迹次优。

Method: 提出RoamFlow框架，使用MeanFlow预测平均速度场进行轨迹合成，实现少步生成降低推理延迟；采用两阶段训练：先模仿专家稳定初始化，再用强化学习优化策略。

Result: 在Habitat仿真和真实机器人平台上，RoamFlow在实时约束下实现了高效推理和强导航性能。

Conclusion: 生成式导航框架RoamFlow有效解决了长程依赖建模问题，兼顾了推理效率与导航性能。

Abstract: Image-goal navigation is a key challenge in embodied robotics, where an agent must reach a target specified solely by a goal image. While existing reinforcement learning approaches map perceptual observations directly to actions, they struggle to model long-horizon dependencies, often leading to suboptimal trajectories. To address this limitation, we propose RoamFlow, a generative navigation framework that leverages MeanFlow to predict the average velocity field for trajectory synthesis, enabling efficient few-step generation and reducing inference latency. We further adopt a two-stage training strategy that combines expert imitation for stable initialization with reinforcement learning for task-specific policy refinement. Extensive experiments in both Habitat simulation and real-world robotic platforms demonstrate that RoamFlow achieves efficient inference while maintaining strong navigation performance under real-time constraints.

</details>


### [462] [OpenSPM: An Environment-Transferable Robotic Key Spatial Pose Memory and Closed-Loop High-Frequency Flow-Matching Action Generation Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29936)
*Iok Tong Lei,Qingchen Xie,Yifan Wang,Yap Ying Jie,Zhidong Deng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: OpenSPM是一个面向开放环境桌面机器人操作的空间持久记忆框架，通过结合语义条件3D感知、卡尔曼滤波追踪、空间位姿记忆和流匹配动作生成模型，在LIBERO-GOAL任务中实现了85.6%的成功率和1033.3Hz的高频控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有端到端VLA模型虽然语义泛化能力强，但缺乏精细几何约束且训练成本高，难以弥合高层语义与底层物理执行之间的鸿沟。

Method: 1）利用语义条件3D感知和卡尔曼滤波跟踪连续6D位姿；2）从人类演示中提取关键空间位姿作为可迁移的物体中心空间持久记忆条目；3）推理时根据自然语言指令检索记忆，通过SE(3)变换转移至新场景，并由轻量条件流匹配模型生成高频动作块；4）结合实时本体感觉反馈和终端残差校正抑制误差累积。

Result: 在LIBERO-GOAL的10个任务上达到85.6%的成功率，等效控制频率1033.3Hz，且推理AI算力需求极低。

Conclusion: 结构化空间持久记忆与闭环残差校正是实现可靠、高频机器人操作的关键，OpenSPM有效弥合了高层语义与底层物理执行之间的差距。

Abstract: Open-environment tabletop robotic manipulation requires systems to possess semantic understanding, precise geometric pose estimation, and high-frequency action generation. While end-to-end vision-language-action (VLA) models excel at semantic generalization, they often lack explicit geometric constraints for fine-grained tasks and require costly training. To bridge the gap between high-level semantics and low-level physical execution, we propose OpenSPM, an open environment spatial persistent memory framework consisting of spatial pose memory and flow-matching action generation model. OpenSPM first leverages semantically conditioned 3D perception and Kalman filtering to track continuous 6D poses. It then extracts key spatial poses from human demonstrations, keeping them as transferable, object-centric spatial persistent memory entries. During inference, OpenSPM retrieves relevant memory entries in terms of natural language instructions, transfers the spatial poses to new scenes using SE(3) transformations, and generates high-frequency action chunks via a lightweight conditional flow-matching model. Combined with real-time proprioceptive state feedback and terminal residual correction, the system effectively suppresses trajectory error accumulation. Evaluated on ten LIBERO-GOAL tasks, OpenSPM achieves an 85.6% success rate and an equivalent control frequency of 1033.3 Hz, while requiring minimal inference AI computing power. Extensive ablations illustrate that structured spatial persistent memory and closed-loop residual correction play a crucial role in reliable, high-frequency robotic manipulation.

</details>


### [463] [REPAIR-Bench: A Benchmark for Robot Error Perception And Interaction Recovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29937)
*Giuliano Pioldi,Yashika Batra,Arman Ibrayeva,Yuanchen Bai,Purnjay Maruur,Promise Ekpo,Angelique Taylor*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出REPAIR-Bench基准，基于214次交互试验和41名参与者，涵盖四种诱发故障类型，提供面部动作单元、头部姿态、语音转录等同步数据，并设计了三个评估任务：跨会话故障检测、视觉故障类型分类、用户中心恢复预测。基线实验表明层次递归模型优于单会话模型，QLoRA微调的Mistral-7B在恢复预测中达到Hit@5=0.76。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究将机器人故障视为独立事件、强调二元故障检测、依赖基于规则的恢复建模，未能捕捉用户长期适应行为和个性化恢复偏好。

Method: 构建REPAIR-Bench基准，包含214次交互试验、41名参与者的多模态数据；设计三项评估任务：层次递归建模检测跨会话故障、视觉分类识别故障类型、QLoRA微调大模型预测用户恢复策略。

Result: 层次递归模型故障检测严格F1=0.80（vs.单会话0.68），定位平均符号误差-0.51s；恢复预测QLoRA-Mistral-7B的Hit@5=0.76，F1@5=0.32。

Conclusion: REPAIR-Bench为HRI和医疗HRI社区提供了标准化评估框架，支持构建透明、自适应、可信赖的机器人故障恢复系统。

Abstract: Understanding how users perceive and respond to robot failures is essential for building robust and trustworthy robot systems. Prior work, however, (i) often treats failures as independent events, (ii) emphasizes binary failure detection, (iii) with rule-based recovery modeling. We present REPAIR-Bench, built on 214 interaction trials from 41 participants, the benchmark spans four induced failure types and provides synchronized facial action units, head pose, speech transcripts, and post-interaction affect and recovery reports. The benchmark spans three novel evaluation tasks that jointly capture the lifecycle of failure in human-robot interaction (HRI): (i) failure detection over inter-dependent interaction sessions, modeling longitudinal user adaptation across repeated failures; (ii) visual failure-type classification beyond binary success/failure formulations; and (iii) user-centered recovery prediction, inferring users' preferred recovery strategies from interaction context rather than relying on manually designed or rule-based strategies. In baseline experiments, hierarchical recurrent modeling improved failure detection over a single-session model (strict F1: 0.80 vs. 0.68), achieved a failure localization mean signed error of -0.51 s, median absolute error of 2.97 s and, for recovery prediction, a QLoRA-tuned Mistral-7B reached Hit@5=0.76 and F1@5=0.32. REPAIR-Bench provides both the HRI and Medical HRI communities with a standardized framework for (1) evaluating robot failures and (2) building transparent, adaptive, and trustworthy recovery systems.

</details>


### [464] [WARP: Whole-Body Retargeting for Learning from Offline Human Demonstrations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29940)
*Zhenyang Chen,Chuizheng Kong,Chuye Zhang,Yuanshao Yang,Lawrence Y. Zhu,Shreyas Kousik,Danfei Xu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出WARP，一种从人体姿态到机器人全身动作的离线重定向方法，通过SEW几何求解器实现精确末端跟踪和懒人移动基座控制，首次实现零样本全身移动操作，无需人类在环遥操作数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有从人类演示到机器人动作的重定向方法存在不精确或不一致的解，导致动作多模态性阻碍监督策略可靠收敛，需要克服显著的具身差距。

Method: 提出WARP离线流程，使用闭式Shoulder-Elbow-Wrist (SEW)几何求解器实现精确末端执行器跟踪，同时保留全身结构意图，配合懒人移动基座控制提取精确一致的机器人轨迹。

Result: WARP为开环真实世界重放提供了高度可靠的数据，首次实现零-shot全身移动操作，无需人类在环遥操作动作数据。

Conclusion: WARP成功弥合了人类演示与机器人全身移动操作之间的具身差距，提供精确、一致的轨迹提取，消除了对遥操作数据的需求。

Abstract: Direct transfer from human demonstration to learnable robot action is a crucial step towards scalable whole-body mobile manipulation. While human data scales better than mobile teleoperation, it requires overcoming significant embodiment gaps. Existing retargeting methods yield imprecise or inconsistent solutions, causing action multi-modality that prevents supervised policies from reliably converging. We present Whole-body-Aware Retargeting from human Pose (WARP), an offline pipeline that explicitly models embodiment differences to extract precise, unique whole-body actions. WARP leverages a closed-form Shoulder-Elbow-Wrist (SEW) geometric solver for exact end-effector tracking while preserving whole-body structural intent. Paired with lazy mobile-base control, it extracts accurate, consistent robot trajectories. Evaluations show WARP provides highly reliable data for open-loop real-world replay. To our knowledge, WARP is the first framework to achieve zero-shot whole-body mobile manipulation directly from offline human demonstrations, eliminating the need for human-in-the-loop teleoperation action data. More details on https://warp-retarget.github.io/

</details>


### [465] [Seeing Touch from Motion: A Unified Modality-Aware Visuo-Tactile Policy with Tactile Motion Correlation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29941)
*Shengqi Xu,Guojin Zhong,Yang Liu,Fanjie Wang,Hu Luo,Hanyu Zhou,Weiyao Zhang,Ziyi Ye,Zuxuan Wu,Yu-Gang Jiang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出基于运动感知的触觉表征和统一模态感知的视觉-触觉策略，解决触觉感知模糊问题并实现跨模态互补融合。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有触觉表征（原始图像或累积运动场）存在感知模糊问题，难以区分细微接触状态；同时视觉-触觉融合策略难以兼顾跨模态交互与模态特异性保持。

Method: 1）利用瞬态运动与累积运动之间的相关性来显式区分细微接触状态，提出运动感知触觉表征；2）基于Mixture-of-Transformers架构，提出统一模态感知的视觉-触觉策略，同时建模跨模态互补性和模态特异性。

Result: 该方法在接触丰富的操作任务中有效提升了触觉表征的区分能力，并实现了更好的视觉-触觉多模态融合效果。

Conclusion: 瞬态与累积运动的相关性可作为显式区分细微接触状态的有效先验，统一模态感知的Transformer架构能更好地兼顾视觉-触觉融合中的模态交互与特异性保持。

Abstract: Visuo-Tactile policies leveraging optical tactile sensors have shown great promise in contact-rich manipulation. These sensors achieve high spatial resolution and multi-dimensional force sensing by utilizing an internal camera to monitor the deformation of their elastic gel surface, thereby indirectly inferring tactile cues. Despite their advantages, extracting fine-grained contact states necessary for contact-rich manipulation remains an open challenge. Existing methods typically use either raw images or cumulative motion fields to represent tactile cues. However, both are prone to perception ambiguity. Raw tactile images mainly capture appearance changes, while cumulative motion fields only reflect the aggregate gel deformation. Consequently, distinct fine-grained contact states can exhibit highly similar patterns, making it difficult to explicitly distinguish subtle contact variations. To address this issue, we explore the dynamic priors of tactile motion and discover that the correlation between transient and cumulative motion can explicitly distinguish fine-grained contact states. Based on this insight, we propose a motion-aware tactile representation to facilitate contact-rich manipulation. Beyond tactile representation, effective fusion of tactile and visual modalities is also critical. Most existing fusion methods either directly concatenate features from each modality or train modality-specific networks separately and fuse their outputs. However, these strategies struggle to simultaneously model cross-modal interactions and preserve modality-specific characteristics. In this work, we take advantage of the Mixture-of-Transformers architecture and propose a unified modality-aware visuo-tactile policy that captures cross-modal complementarity while maintaining modality-specific properties.

</details>


### [466] [Heterogeneous Tactile Transformer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29948)
*Jianxin Bi,Qiang Wang,Jayaram Reddy,Kelvin Lin,Soibkhon Khajikhanov,Ruihan Gao,Harold Soh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出异构触觉变换器（HTT）框架，通过跨模态掩码重建和配对对齐学习异构触觉传感器的共享表征，并用自建HPT数据集（160万配对帧）验证其在感知和操作任务中的可迁移性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 触觉传感器天然异构，一个传感器上训练的模型无法直接用于另一个传感器，限制了从多样化触觉数据中大规模学习接触丰富的操作策略。

Method: 提出HTT框架，包含传感器专用编码器和共享Transformer主干；采用逐模态掩码重建预训练，并结合配对传感器间的跨模态对齐；使用新构建的HPT数据集（160万同步配对帧，涵盖4种视觉和阵列触觉传感器）。

Result: 在多种触觉感知和真实世界操作任务中，HTT学习了可迁移的表征，能适应新任务和未见过的传感器。

Conclusion: HTT有效桥接了异构触觉传感器的表征鸿沟，实现了跨传感器的知识迁移，数据集和代码将开源。

Abstract: Tactile sensors are inherently heterogeneous: a model trained on one sensor cannot be directly used on another, which limits learning contact-rich manipulation policies from diverse tactile data at scale. To bridge this gap, we propose the Heterogeneous Tactile Transformer (HTT), a framework that learns shared tactile representations across heterogeneous sensors. HTT consists of sensor-specific encoders and a shared transformer trunk, and is pretrained with per-modality masked reconstruction together with cross-modal alignment between paired sensors. Pretraining uses our novel Heterogeneous Paired Tactile (HPT) dataset, containing 1.6M synchronized paired frames across four vision- and array-based tactile sensors. Across distinct tactile perception and real-world manipulation tasks, HTT is shown to learn transferable representations that adapt to new tasks and previously unseen sensors. Dataset, code, and model checkpoints will be released upon publication at https://jxbi1010.github.io/htt-gh-page/.

</details>


### [467] [SIR: Structured Image Representations for Explainable Robot Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30101)
*Paul Mattes,Jan Schwab,Jens Bosch,Nils Blank,Maximilian Xiling Li,Minh-Trung Tang,Moritz Haberland,Rudolf Lioutikov*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出结构化图像表示（SIR）方法，利用场景图作为中间表示进行机器人策略学习，通过端到端学习稀疏化全连接图生成任务相关子图，实现可解释性，并在RoboCasa上取得优于图像基线的性能（19.5% vs 14.81%成功率）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于学习视觉嵌入的机器人策略缺乏显式结构，易受视觉干扰影响，其决策过程不透明、难以解释。

Method: 首先利用图像特征构建全连接图作为初始节点表示，然后通过模块端到端学习稀疏化该图，生成任务相关的子图，再传递给动作生成模型。

Result: 在RoboCasa上，稀疏图策略平均成功率达19.5%，优于图像基线的14.81%。此外，通过分析子图与人类期望的偏差，成功揭示了数据集中的虚假相关性和位置偏差。

Conclusion: SIR方法通过场景图中间表示实现了可解释的机器人策略学习，且稀疏图分析能有效发现数据集偏差。

Abstract: Existing robot policies based on learned visual embeddings lack explicit structure and are sensitive to visual distractions. Thus, the representations that drive their behaviour are often opaque, making their decision-making process difficult to interpret. To address this, we introduce Structured Image Representations (SIR), a method that leverages Scene Graphs (SGs) as an intermediate representation for robot policy learning. Our approach first constructs a fully connected graph, using image-derived features as initial node representations. Then, a module learns to sparsify this graph end-to-end, creating a task-relevant sub-graph that is passed to the action generation model. This process makes our model intrinsically explainable. Evaluations on RoboCasa show that our sparse graph policies outperform image-based baselines on average with 19.5% vs 14.81% success rate. Most importantly, we show that the learned sparse graphs are a powerful tool for model analysis. By analysing when the model's sub-graph deviates from human expectation, such as by including distractor nodes or omitting key objects, we successfully uncover dataset biases, including spurious correlations and positional biases. https://github.com/intuitive-robots/SIR_Model

</details>


### [468] [TacEvo: Self-Evolving Architecture Discovery for Robotic Tactile Perception via LLM-Driven Quality-Diversity Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30109)
*Mohammed AbuSadeh,Lan Wei,Dandan Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: TacEvo 利用大语言模型和进化算法自动演化神经网络架构，在触觉感知任务中达到了甚至超越人工专家设计的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 触觉传感器产生的图像具有传感器特异性和物理特异性，传统人工设计网络架构需要专家经验和大量手动迭代，而现有的神经架构搜索方法计算成本高且搜索空间受限，难以发现新颖架构。

Method: TacEvo 结合 LLM 生成代码级变异和交叉操作，使用 MAP-Elites 质量多样性算法保留精英架构，并通过两个行为描述子——架构多样性和效率比——引导搜索，同时优先复用持续带来改进的提示。

Result: 在 ViTacTip 力回归和光栅分类任务上，TacEvo 达到 96.0%/94.5% 的可训练架构生成可靠性，20 代内最优适应度提升 56.1%/96.1%；在 20 轮高保真评估中，力预测性能持平专家基线，细粒度分类性能超越专家基线。

Conclusion: LLM 驱动的自进化搜索为专用机器人感知领域的 AI 辅助科学发现提供了一种实用范式。

Abstract: Vision-based tactile sensing converts contact-induced surface deformation into images, enabling robots to infer contact forces and fine surface textures that are not accessible through conventional vision alone. However, tactile images are sensor- and physics-specific, so effective architectures often require expert intuition and extensive manual iteration. Existing neural architecture search (NAS) pipelines can reduce this burden, but they are often computationally expensive and restricted to hand-designed search spaces, which limits architectural novelty and diversity. We introduce TacEvo, a self-evolving architecture discovery framework that improves network designs from downstream feedback. TacEvo uses an LLM to generate code-level mutations and crossovers, and a MAP-Elites quality-diversity loop that preserves diverse elite architectures while preferentially reusing prompts that consistently yield improvements. Exploration is guided by two behavioural descriptors, Architectural Diversity and Efficiency Ratio, which encourage coverage across structural variations and compute-size trade-offs. On ViTacTip force regression and grating classification, TacEvo achieves high autonomous generation reliability (96.0%/94.5% trainable) and improves best validation fitness over 20 generations by 56.1%/96.1%. In a 20-seed post-search high-fidelity evaluation, TacEvo matches the expert baseline on force prediction and outperforms it on fine-grained grating classification. These results suggest that LLM-driven self-evolving search constitutes a practical paradigm for AI-assisted scientific discovery in specialised robotic sensing.

</details>


### [469] [Automating the Design of Embodied AgentArchitectures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30111)
*Jian Zhou,Sihao Lin,Jin Li,Shuai Fu,Gengze Zhou,Qi Wu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文研究了将Agent Architecture Search (AAS)从文本域迁移到具身智能体，提出AgentCanvas运行时系统和KDLoop搜索程序，在四种具身执行器上评估了三类AAS变体，发现架构级搜索能带来成功率提升，但也揭示了具身场景中特有的局限：优化信号被交互噪声掩盖、搜索陷入局部编辑盆地、信用分配难以充分实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 具身智能体通常由人工手工设计感知、记忆、规划和动作模块，这种模块化设计空间巨大，但依赖研究者直觉来做出架构决策。AAS方法已在文本域智能体中实现自动化设计，但尚未在需要通过模拟器交互的感知型具身智能体上进行系统评估，因此需要研究这种迁移的有效性和局限性。

Method: 提出两个技术组件：1) AgentCanvas——带类型图的运行时系统，将具身执行器建模为可编辑的节点-连线程序，支持模拟器感知执行和回合级日志；2) KDLoop——一种编码智能体搜索过程，通过"提出-批评-实验-蒸馏"循环并在停滞时触发反思。在三种AAS变体上，对四个具身执行器（涵盖视觉-语言导航、具身问答、语言条件操控）进行3×4矩阵式评估。

Result: 架构级搜索可在具身任务上产生可部署的成功率提升方向性增益，但一个表现突出的候选者被发现存在信息泄露问题。同时实验暴露了具身域特有的约束：交互噪声掩盖优化信号、搜索陷入局部编辑盆地、即便有详细日志，回合级信用分配也只是部分涌现。

Conclusion: 这些结果刻画了自动化架构搜索用于具身智能体的前景和当前局限，表明AAS迁移到具身域虽有潜力，但需克服噪声、局部最优和信用分配等特有挑战。

Abstract: Embodied agents are typically built as hand-designed compositions of perception, memory, planning, and action modules. This modularity exposes a large architectural design space, but current systems still rely on researcher intuition to choose where information is stored, how observations are processed, and how model calls are connected. Agent Architecture Search (AAS) automates such design for text-domain agents, but has not been systematically evaluated on perceptual embodied agents through simulator rollouts. We study this transfer. We introduce AgentCanvas, a typed-graph runtime that hosts embodied executors as editable node-and-wire programs with simulator-aware execution and episode-level logs, and KDLoop, a coding-agent search procedure that cycles through proposal, critique, experiment, and distillation, with triggered reflection after stalls. We evaluate three AAS variants across four embodied executors spanning vision-language navigation, embodied question answering, and language-conditioned manipulation. The resulting 3x4 matrix shows that architecture-level search can produce deployable and directional success-rate gains on embodied tasks, while one apparent high-scoring candidate is rejected as leak-bearing. At the same time, the experiments expose constraints that are muted in text-domain AAS: optimization signals can be masked by rollout noise, search can become trapped in local edit basins, and episode-level credit assignment only partially emerges even when detailed logs are available. These results characterize both the promise and the current limits of automated architecture search for embodied agents.

</details>


### [470] [SA-VLA: State-aware tokenizer for improving Vision-Language-Action Models' performance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30113)
*Tengyue Jiang,Chunpu Xu,Jiayue Kang,Yao Mu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出SA-VLA，一种状态感知的动作分词器，通过将机器人当前状态信息注入离散动作编码解码过程，显著提升了离散VLA策略在操作任务中的连续动作恢复精度和成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的离散动作分词器将每个离散码映射到固定的连续动作原型，忽略了机器人当前的 proprioceptive 状态（如关节构型、物体位姿、接触条件），导致同一动作码在不同状态下需要不同的连续控制，限制了离散VLA策略的精度。

Method: 提出两种状态注入机制：(1) 状态与动作特征之间的交叉注意力；(2) 轻量级状态适配器，预测动作维度的调制因子，实现状态条件化的动作调制与重建。该适配器扩展了有限码本的有效支持范围，使每个离散token可表示一族状态依赖的连续动作。

Result: 在12个RoboTwin操作任务上，平均成功率从0.29提升至0.56；在3个真实世界的零样本sim-to-real实验中，平均成功率从0.15提升至0.33。

Conclusion: 状态条件化的动作解码是一种简单有效的机制，能够缩小离散VLA策略中的压缩间隙，同时保持离散动作建模的效率和兼容性。

Abstract: Discrete action tokenization provides a compact interface for autoregressive VLA policies, but accurately recovering continuous robot actions from discrete codes remains challenging. Existing tokenizers typically map each discrete code to a fixed continuous action prototype, ignoring the robot's current proprioceptive state. This limitation is particularly pronounced in manipulation, where the same action token may require different continuous controls under different joint configurations, object poses, and contact conditions. We therefore propose SA-VLA, a state-aware action tokenizer that conditions action decoding on robot state. We study two state-injection mechanisms for VQ-based action tokenization: cross-attention between state and action features, and a lightweight state adapter that predicts action-wise modulation factors for state-conditioned action modulation and reconstruction. The adapter formulation expands the effective support of a finite codebook by allowing each discrete token to represent a family of state-dependent continuous actions, while preserving the efficiency and compatibility of discrete action modeling. Integrated into an LLM-based VLA policy, SA-VLA supports both autoregressive and parallel action-token decoding with minimal changes to the model interface. On 12 RoboTwin manipulation tasks, SA-VLA improves the average success rate from 0.29 to 0.56 over the strongest tokenizer baseline. In zero-shot sim-to-real experiments on three real-world tasks, it further improves average success from 0.15 to 0.33 over the strongest tokenizer baseline. These results demonstrate that state-conditioned action decoding is a simple and effective mechanism for reducing the compression gap in discrete VLA policies.

</details>


### [471] [AERIS: Aerial-Edge Role-Driven Intelligence at Runtime via Orchestrated Language-Model Swarm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30151)
*Jiabin Lou,Haopeng Wang,Xinyu Liu,Yu Zhang,Rongye Shi,Wenjun Wu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: AERIS是一个面向空中平台的边缘部署框架，通过组织专用小语言模型和轻量级感知控制模块，在心跳约束调度和有限算力下实现实时闭环的无人机视觉语言导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将大语言模型集成到机器人系统中面临心跳约束调度和计算资源有限的挑战，现有方法难以在边缘平台实现实时闭环部署。

Method: 提出AERIS框架：1) 将专用小语言模型组织为可实例化角色，动态绑定到不同执行器；2) 通过注意力-子目标对齐机制实现长程指令分解；3) 采用低频规划器与高频控制器的心跳定时执行机制。

Result: 在高保真无人机视觉语言导航基准上验证了有效性，通过两个真实世界实验验证了可部署性。

Conclusion: AERIS能够在资源受限的边缘平台上实现稳定的感知-决策-控制闭环，支持实时操作，为空中机器人智能边缘部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Integrating large language models into robotic systems holds promise for enhancing autonomy, yet practical deployment remains constrained by strict heartbeat-constrained scheduling and limited computational power. We propose AERIS: an edge deployment framework for aerial platforms. It organizes dedicated small language models combined with lightweight perception and control modules into roles that can be instantiated at runtime, and dynamically rebinds them across different executors as resources change, thereby pushing intelligent capabilities to the edge. AERIS achieves long-horizon instruction decomposition through an attention-subgoal alignment mechanism, which involves annotating the currently active instruction step in messages, thereby progressively approaching long-term objectives. We evaluate AERIS on a high-fidelity UAV Vision-and-Language Navigation benchmark. Under a heartbeat-timed execution mechanism, AERIS maintains a stable perception-decision-control loop between a low-frequency planner and a high-frequency controller, supporting real-time closed-loop operation. We further validate its deployability through two real-world experiments focused on planning and fast response. A demonstration video is provided in the supplementary materials.

</details>


### [472] [Self-supervised Geometry Reasoning for LiDAR Simultaneous Localization and Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30166)
*Jiwoo Kim,Jinwoo Lee,Woojae Shin,Giseop Kim,Hyondong Oh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种自监督学习框架，通过将点云表示为高斯分布来学习局部几何的符号表征，并递归地提升LiDAR SLAM的定位与建图精度，且无需密集标签或真值位姿。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LiDAR SLAM依赖手工设计的局部几何量（如协方差、对应关系），在点云稀疏或低分辨率LiDAR下易产生噪声和不稳定的几何估计，亟需一种能自动学习鲁棒局部几何表征的方法。

Method: 将每个点建模为高斯分布，用协方差描述局部几何；通过最大化局部几何似然进行自监督学习，自监督信号来自预测协方差、对应关系与SLAM轨迹之间的一致性约束；将学到的几何反馈回SLAM，形成递归优化循环。该框架与后端无关，可即插即用。

Result: 在KITTI数据集上不同LiDAR分辨率下，该方法在里程计和全局配准精度上均取得提升。

Conclusion: 自监督学习局部几何符号表征可有效提升LiDAR SLAM在稀疏或低分辨率场景下的鲁棒性与精度，且方法通用易集成。

Abstract: LiDAR simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) relies on local geometric quantities such as covariances, correspondences, and surface structures. However, most existing pipelines rely on hand-crafted estimates of local geometry and use them as fixed inputs to LiDAR SLAM, which can make the estimated local geometry noisy and unstable in sparse regions of a point cloud or when using low-resolution LiDAR. To address this issue, this paper introduces a self-supervised framework that learns an explicit symbolic representation of local geometry and uses it to improve LiDAR SLAM recursively. Specifically, each point is represented as a Gaussian distribution, allowing local geometry to be described by a covariance. Without dense geometry labels or ground-truth poses, the framework learns by maximizing the likelihood of local geometry, with self-supervision derived from consistency relations over symbolic geometric representations, including predicted covariances, correspondences, and trajectory from SLAM. The learned geometry is then fed back into LiDAR SLAM, forming a reciprocal loop in which improved geometry enhances localization and mapping, and improved localization provides cleaner supervision for subsequent geometry reasoning. This framework is backend-agnostic and can be plugged into existing LiDAR SLAM pipelines without architectural changes. Experiments on KITTI under varying LiDAR resolutions show that the proposed method improves both odometry and global registration.

</details>


### [473] [KYON: Semi-Modular Wheel-Legged Quadruped With Agile Bimanual Capability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30243)
*Luca Rossini,Arturo Laurenzi,Francesco Ruscelli,Yifang Zhang,Giovanbattista Gravina,Lorenzo Baccelliere,Corrado Burchielli,Stefano Cordasco,Nikos Tsagarakis*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出KYON，一种混合轮腿四足机器人，配备双臂上身用于移动操作任务。该平台采用半模块化设计，可重构下肢，实现轮式和腿式两种运动模式，并通过将致动器置于基座、使用传动机构减少远端惯性的设计，提升了敏捷性和动态性能。机器人集成了全身控制框架与强化学习策略，独立处理非线性动力学并增强对干扰的鲁棒性。实验验证了其在复杂非结构化场景中的动态移动和双臂操作能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人在复杂非结构化环境中同时实现动态 locomotion 和双臂 manipulation 的能力不足，需要一种既能适应不同地形又能保持灵活操作性能的平台。

Method: 采用半模块化可重构下肢设计，致动器置于基座并配合传动机构以减少远端惯性；集成全身控制框架与基于强化学习的策略，独立处理 locomotion 和 manipulation 任务。

Result: 实验表明机器人能够有效执行动态 locomotion 和双臂 manipulation 任务，验证了其在复杂非结构化场景中的操作能力。

Conclusion: KYON平台通过混合轮腿设计与全身控制框架，成功实现了在复杂环境中的移动与操作能力，为后续移动操作机器人研究提供了有效方案。

Abstract: This paper presents KYON, a hybrid wheel-legged quadruped robot equipped with a bimanual upper body for loco-manipulation tasks. The platform features a semi-modular design with a reconfigurable lower legs, enabling both wheeled and legged locomotion depending on the environment. A design approach that places actuators in the base and uses transmission mechanisms reduces distal inertia, improving agility and dynamic performance. The robot integrates a whole-body control framework together with a reinforcement learning based policy to handle nonlinear dynamics and enhance robustness to disturbances for the execution of locomotion and manipulation tasks, independently. Experimental results demonstrate effective dynamic locomotion and bimanual manipulation, validating the platform's capability to operate in complex and unstructured scenarios.

</details>


### [474] [ConCent: Contact-Centric Real-to-Sim-to-Real Learning from One Demonstration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30268)
*Heecheol Kim,Namiko Saito,Katsushi Ikeuchi,Yasuyuki Matsushita*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种以接触为中心的实到仿到实强化学习框架，通过从真实演示中提取接触事件序列作为奖励信号，引导策略学习物理合理的接触模式，从而提升接触丰富型操作的仿真到现实策略迁移的稳定性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 仿真到现实的策略迁移在接触丰富的操作任务中面临接触动力学差异带来的挑战，细微的接触差异可能导致任务彻底失败。现有方法缺乏对接触保真度的显式建模，需要解决这一关键问题。

Method: 提出接触中心的实到仿到实RL框架：1) 从真实演示中自动提取任务相关的接触事件序列；2) 将物体近似为基元组并优化仿真中的接触几何，使局部接触动力学能解释真实状态转换；3) 以接触事件序列作为结构化奖励信号，引导策略学习物理合理的接触模式，无需逐任务设计奖励。

Result: 在接触丰富的操作任务实验中，相比无约束的RL基线方法，该方法实现了更稳定、更鲁棒的仿真到现实策略迁移。

Conclusion: 以接触为中心的保真度（复现接触事件序列和局部接触动力学）是操作任务成功的必要条件，基于这一洞见提出的框架能有效提升sim-to-real迁移性能。

Abstract: Sim-to-real policy transfer -- deploying policies trained in simulation in the real world -- is a promising paradigm for scaling robot manipulation without large-scale real-world data. However, transferring simulation-trained policies remains challenging due to discrepancies in contact dynamics -- particularly in contact-rich tasks where subtle differences can alter task outcomes entirely. Because interaction between the manipulated object and the environment is mediated through contact, task success depends on accurately reproducing task-relevant contacts. Accordingly, in manipulation, contact-centric fidelity -- reproducing both the contact event sequence (when, where, and how contacts occur) and the local contact dynamics (how forces and motions evolve at each contact) -- is a necessary condition for task success. Based on this insight, we propose a contact-centric real-to-sim-to-real RL framework that uses task-relevant contact event sequences extracted from real demonstrations as the learning objective. We approximate objects as groups of primitives and optimize their contact geometry in simulation so that the resulting local contact dynamics explain the observed state transitions. The contact event sequence is automatically extracted by replaying the demonstration. This sequence serves as a structured reward signal, guiding the policy toward physically plausible contact regimes validated in reality and preventing exploitation of unrealistic simulator contacts. The signal is obtained automatically, requiring no per-task reward design. Experiments on contact-rich manipulation tasks demonstrate more stable and robust sim-to-real policy transfer compared to unconstrained RL baselines.

</details>


### [475] [ActiveVital: Geometry-Aware Embodied Vital Signs Monitoring for Home Healthcare Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30275)
*Yuxuan Hu,Shihao Li,Yang Xiao,Gen Li,Feng Xu,Jianfei Yang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出ActiveVital框架，利用视觉引导机器人主动调整毫米波雷达与人体胸部的相对角度，将生命体征监测从被动信号恢复转变为主动几何调控，显著提升非接触式呼吸和心率测量的精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 家庭机器人在非约束环境中进行非接触式生命体征监测时，由于毫米波雷达仅能观测径向运动，机器人-人体间的任意朝向会导致角度偏差，使呼吸和心率估计不稳定。

Method: 提出ActiveVital视觉引导感知框架：通过视觉关键点定位胸部锚点，将对准误差转化为控制命令，驱动机载雷达朝向胸廓表面近乎法线入射，最大化径向可观测性，并引入差分相位增强模块来稳定运动下的信号提取。

Result: 呼吸间隔误差从0.87秒降至0.14秒，心率误差从13.59 bpm降至2.22 bpm，在非约束机器人-人体配置下达到与受控静态感知相当的精度。

Conclusion: 将传感几何作为显式控制变量，通过感知-动作闭环主动优化观测角度，可有效克服毫米波雷达在自由移动机器人场景下的生命体征监测瓶颈。

Abstract: Home robots require reliable vital signs monitoring to support long-term companionship and safety in daily environments, yet obtaining respiration and heart rate without physical contact remains challenging in unconstrained home settings. Millimeter-wave (mmWave) radar offers a promising solution due to its phase sensitivity to sub-millimeter motions. However, mmWave measurements are fundamentally constrained by observation geometry, since only the radial component of motion is observable. Consequently, arbitrary robot-human orientations often introduce angular misalignment that destabilizes vital signs estimation. To address this limitation, we reformulate vital signs monitoring from passive signal recovery to active geometric regulation. We propose ActiveVital, a vision-guided sensing framework that treats sensing geometry as an explicit control variable for robots. It localizes the chest anchor via visual keypoints and converts alignment errors into control commands. This steers the robot-mounted radar toward near-normal incidence to the thoracic surface, maximizing radial observability within a perception-action loop. A differential phase enhancement module further stabilizes signal extraction under motion. Experiments show that ActiveVital reduces respiration interval error from 0.87 s to 0.14 s and heart rate error from 13.59 bpm to 2.22 bpm, achieving accuracy comparable to controlled static sensing while remaining robust under unconstrained robot-human configurations.

</details>


### [476] [X-Morph: Human Motion Priors for Scalable Robot Learning Across Morphologies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30290)
*Ritwik Sharma,Shivam Sood,Arhaan Jain,Shyam Charan Kesavamoorthi,Chengyang He,Guillaume Sartoretti*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: X-Morph 提出了一种将人类运动转化为非人形腿式机器人（四足、六足、带机械臂的四足机器人）可部署的运动策略的流水线。通过跨形态重定向和强化学习训练，使不同形态的机器人能够模仿人类运动，并支持视频遥操作、行为先验控制和文本条件运动生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非人形腿式机器人（如四足、六足机器人）缺乏丰富的行为运动数据，而人类运动数据丰富。现有方法直接重定向人类运动到这些机器人上会产生物理不一致或难以跟踪的问题，因此需要一种跨形态的运动转换方法。

Method: 提出 X-Morph 流水线：1) 跨形态重定向阶段，将人类运动转换为运动学可行且保持意图的机器人参考轨迹；2) 使用特权强化学习策略跟踪该参考轨迹；3) 蒸馏为因果学生策略，实现零观测延迟部署。

Result: 在四足、六足、带机械臂的四足机器人三种平台上验证，策略能够跟踪多样化的重定向运动、泛化到未见的人类运动，并支持视频遥操作、行为先验控制和文本条件运动生成等下游任务。

Conclusion: 大规模人类运动数据可以作为学习非人形机器人广泛、可复用的行为先验的有效基础，拓展了人类运动数据在机器人领域的应用边界。

Abstract: Recent progress in humanoid behavior models has been driven in large part by abundant human motion data, but comparable motion data is scarce for non-humanoid legged robots such as quadrupeds, hexapods, and quadruped manipulators. A promising alternative is to repurpose human motion across embodiments; however, direct retargeting often produces motions that are visually plausible yet physically inconsistent or difficult to track under robot dynamics. We present X-Morph, a human-motion-to-robot-behavior pipeline that converts human motion into deployable locomotion and loco-manipulation policies for diverse non-humanoid legged morphologies. A cross-morphology retargeting stage converts human motions into kinematically plausible, intent-preserving robot references, which are then tracked by a privileged RL policy and distilled into a causal student policy. We evaluate X-Morph on three morphologically distinct platforms: a quadruped, a hexapod, and a quadruped equipped with a manipulator. The resulting policies track diverse retargeted motions, generalize to unseen human motions, and support downstream use cases including video-based teleoperation, behavior-prior control, and text-conditioned motion generation. These results suggest that large-scale human motion can serve as a substrate for learning broad, reusable behavior priors beyond humanoid robots. Project page: https://maker-rat.github.io/morph/

</details>


### [477] [CSAR: Containerized System Architecture for Robotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30293)
*Ambrosio-Cestero,Gregorio,Galindo Andrades,Cipriano,Gonzalez-Jimenez,Javier,Ruiz-Sarmiento,Jose-Raul*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出CSAR（容器化系统架构），一种面向机器人团队和边缘-云连续体的容器中心架构框架，通过LXC/LXD系统容器化、ROS 2/DDS通信和三层边缘基础设施，解决了多用户机器人软件开发中的依赖隔离、兼容性、可复现性、硬件共享和异构部署等挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人应用越来越依赖分布式计算基础设施（嵌入式设备、边缘服务器、云资源），加之机器人项目的协作特性，使得开发、集成、部署和长期运维变得极其复杂。多用户机器人软件团队面临依赖隔离、兼容性、可复现性、专用硬件高效共享和跨异构环境部署等持续挑战。

Method: CSAR结合LXC/LXD系统容器化、ROS 2/DDS通信和三层边缘基础设施架构（基础设施核心层、平台与多用户编排层、计算与加速层），将计算组织为硬件亲和、持久的执行环境，与实验性工作负载解耦，提供强隔离、可控资源共享和拓扑感知网络。

Result: 通过真实学术机器人实验室部署和边缘卸载3D SLAM、GPU加速语义映射等用例评估，CSAR简化了软件集成，提高了共享计算资源利用率，促进了安全原型设计以及可复现、协作式的机器人团队实验。

Conclusion: CSAR为机器人团队提供了一种有效的容器中心架构方案，解决了多用户环境下的关键工程挑战，其实现已在GitHub上开源。

Abstract: Robotic applications increasingly rely on distributed computational infrastructures that combine embedded devices, edge servers, and cloud resources.
